text: A typical set of clothing and equipment used by UNPSC Explorers on missions to the Radius in the 1990s and early 2000s.
new_translation: 这是1990年代至2000年代初，UNPSC 探索者在半径任务中使用的典型服装和装备。

text: The items presented are part of the exhibition marking the 20th anniversary of the UNPSC's research into the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 这些展品是纪念 UNPSC 研究 Pechorsk 异常20周年展览的一部分。

text: Choose which hand to wear the Explorer's Watch and Compass on.
new_translation: 选择将探索者手表和指南针佩戴在哪只手上。

text: • Bring it close to your chest to wear (make sure you're not wearing another uniform). • Hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Grip to take off the uniform.
new_translation: • 靠近胸前即可穿上（请确认你没有穿着另一套制服）。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} 并按下抓握即可脱下制服。

text:
Thank you for completing the game's story!
You can now exit or continue playing in free mode, with no story or progression.
new_translation:
感谢您完成游戏的故事模式！
您现在可以退出或在自由模式中继续游玩，不含故事和进度。

text: Please select a Difficulty Preset for the desired number of players and set the Difficulty Level.
new_translation: 请根据玩家数量选择难度预设，并设置难度等级。

text: Difficulty Preset does not limit the number of players in Co-op (up to 4 people). It adjusts the Difficulty Level accordingly.
new_translation: 合作模式中，难度预设不会限制玩家数量（最多4人），但会相应调整难度等级。

text: Pick up the gun to practice smooth aiming.
new_translation: 拾起枪械来练习稳定瞄准。

text: Hold the gun with both hands, start aiming and press {BTN_Top} with your non-dominant hand to activate smooth aiming.
new_translation: 双手持枪并开始瞄准，然后用非惯用手按下{BTN_Top}以启用稳定瞄准。

text: To stop smooth aiming, press {BTN_Top} again or move the gun away from your face.
new_translation: 要停止稳定瞄准，请再次按下{BTN_Top}或将枪从面前移开。

text: • Hold a gun with both hands. • Press {BTN_Top} with your non-dominant hand to activate smooth aiming. • Press {BTN_Top} again or move the gun away from your face to stop smooth aiming.
new_translation: • 双手持枪。 • 用非惯用手按下{BTN_Top}以激活稳定瞄准。 • 再次按下{BTN_Top}或将枪从面部移开以停止稳定瞄准。

text:
Self-Help Memo for Explorers
and Explorer Candidates
new_translation: 探索者及候选人自助备忘录

text:
If you're experiencing physical or mental discomfort:
1. Inhale and exhale slowly.
2. Move around: do some squats, stretch forward, jump in place, and swing your arms.
3. Say out loud: 5 objects you can see / 5 sounds you can hear / your Explorer ID and Facility number.
4. Take a shower.
5. Get a good night's sleep.
6. Request support from your fellow Explorer during the next expedition.
new_translation:
如果你感到身体或精神不适：
1. 缓慢吸气呼气。
2. 四处活动：做一些深蹲、向前伸展、原地跳跃和摆动手臂。
3. 大声说出：5个你能看到的物体 / 5个你能听到的声音 / 你的探索者 ID 和基地编号。
4. 洗个澡。
5. 好好睡一觉。
6. 在下一次探险中请求同伴支持。

text:
1. Insert a magazine into the device from the left side.

2. Insert any ammo box into the device from the right side.

3. Push the handle from above to load the magazine.
new_translation:
1. 从左侧将弹匣插入装置。

2. 从右侧将任何弹药盒插入装置。

3. 从上方推动手柄来装填弹匣。

text:

It may be unstable and contain bugs that significantly affect the experience.

注意！两人以上合作模式目前处于测试阶段。
可能会出现不稳定情况并包含严重影响体验的错误。

new_translation: 语音聊天已关闭。您可以在设置中开启。

text:
Every Altered individual has a companion that appears in the form of someone from the host's past chosen for maximum emotional impact.
Though it resembles a hallucination, it is not psychological in origin and is unaffected by medication.
Companions are visible only to their hosts within the PA.
They motivate their hosts and guide them toward the PA's center.
new_translation:
每一名异变者都会拥有一位“同伴”。它会以宿主过去某个人的形象出现，并被选择成最能撼动宿主情绪的模样。
尽管它看起来像幻觉，但其来源并非心理因素，也不会受到药物影响。
同伴只有在 Pechorsk 异常区内才会被宿主看见。
它们会激励宿主，并引导宿主前往 Pechorsk 异常区的中心。

text:
I refuse to work for the Committee.

I'm not going back to their Facility.

I will stay in the Radius.

I will get everything I need on my own.
new_translation:
我拒绝为委员会工作。

我不会回到他们的基地。

我将留在半径内。

我会靠自己获取所需的一切。

text:
The Radius is almighty. It created this world and every one of us. The Radius sees everything. Its Presence watches over us. The Radius has a design. It gave us purpose and waits for us to fulfill it. The Radius tests us. It places obstacles in our way and gives us everything we need to overcome them.
I feel its Presence. And I'm walking towards its center.
new_translation:
半径无所不能。它创造了这个世界，也创造了我们每一个人。半径洞察一切，它的存在注视着我们。半径自有安排。它赋予我们目标，并等待我们去完成。半径考验我们，在前路设下阻碍，又给予我们跨越阻碍所需的一切。
我能感受到它的存在。而我正走向它的中心。

text:
The Committee knows about our Guides and sees them as a threat. They lie to us about them. Your Guide is not a figment of your imagination, not a symptom of amnesia, and not a side-effect of rebirth. Value them. Listen to them. And don't ever get rid of them! I destroyed my Guide. I lost an important part of myself. Now I'll never make it to the center of the Radius...
Aleksei
new_translation:
委员会知道我们的向导，并把他们视为威胁。他们在这件事上一直欺骗我们。你的向导不是你想象出来的幻影，不是失忆的症状，也不是重生带来的副作用。珍惜他们，倾听他们，永远不要抛弃他们！我毁掉了我的向导，也失去了自己重要的一部分。现在，我永远也到不了半径的中心了……
——阿列克谢

text:
If you're reading this, it means I've already left for my final mission.
We've been through a lot together. Completed countless tasks. Always had each other's backs.
We made a great team, but... I'm sorry, I have to take this trip alone, my friend. I'm sure you'll understand.
Explorer 45
new_translation:
如果你读到这封信，就说明我已经去执行最后的任务了。
我们一起经历了太多，完成了数不清的任务，也一直互相照应。
我们曾是很棒的搭档，但是……抱歉，朋友，这趟路我必须一个人走。我相信你会理解。
——45号探索者

text:
There is a legend about a friendly Spawn or Creep that never attacks.
Explorers call it Pecho.
So far, no one has managed to tame it, but some say you can still encounter it.
Some Explorers make toy Pechos and leave them in the Radius for others to find.
They say that if you carry one of these toys, enemies will have a harder time hitting you.
new_translation:
有个传说，说半径里存在一种友善的生成体或潜行体，从不主动攻击人。
探索者们叫它“佩乔”。
至今没人真正驯服过它，但有人说你仍然可能遇见它。
一些探索者会制作佩乔玩具，把它们留在半径中，等别人发现。
据说只要带着这种玩具，敌人就更难击中你。

text:
They say that every now and then, you can encounter an Explorer Mimic in the Radius.
It only appears at night, wears armor and a helmet, fires various altered guns, and can restore its health using altered syringes.
It will hunt down an Explorer until either it kills them or is killed.
Once destroyed, it won't reappear until the next Tide.
new_translation:
据说，偶尔能在半径遇到一名探索者拟态体。
它只在夜间出现，身穿盔甲和头盔，使用各种改造过的枪械射击，并能通过改造过的注射器恢复生命值。
它会追捕探索者，直到将其杀死或自身被消灭。
一旦被摧毁，直到下一次潮汐来临前都不会再出现。

text: My grandma was born on one of these islands. She used to tell me stories about the local fishermen. Some more believable than others. The one I still remember was about my great-grandfather and his friends deciding to smuggle alcohol across the Finnish border. Almost got caught by border patrol on their very first try, so they quickly gave up that idea and went back to fishing. I wish I could've spent more time with her... I bet she had a lot more to tell.
new_translation: 我奶奶出生在这些岛屿中的一个。她以前常给我讲当地渔民的故事，有些听起来更可信，有些就不一定了。我还记得其中一个：我的曾祖父和他的朋友们决定把酒偷运过芬兰边境，结果第一次尝试就差点被边防巡逻抓住。于是他们很快放弃了这个念头，老老实实回去捕鱼。真希望我能多陪陪她……她一定还有很多故事可以讲。

text: I still remember my first time fishing with grandpa. We dug up a bunch of worms the night before and put them into a jar, but I forgot to close it. By morning, half of them were crawling all over the bedroom. Grandpa made me a fishing rod out of a stick and a piece of string. We waited for hours only to catch two tiny Smelts right before heading home. From then on, grandma'd always chuckle at us each time we went fishing...
new_translation: 我还记得第一次和爷爷去钓鱼。前一晚我们挖了一堆蚯蚓装进罐子里，可我忘了把盖子盖好。到了早上，一半蚯蚓已经爬满了卧室。爷爷用一根树枝和一段绳子给我做了鱼竿。我们等了好几个小时，临回家前才钓到两条小胡瓜鱼。从那以后，每次我们去钓鱼，奶奶都会笑我们……

text: I wonder which of these houses belonged to your grandparents... They sent you here each summer and you'd always refuse to go without me. I think your mom was just pretending to be annoyed, but she didn't really mind. Remember how we'd ride our bikes and steal apples from uncle Nikita's garden? We played skirmish, hunted for treasures... and this is where I met Yul'ka...
new_translation: 我在想，这些房子里哪一栋曾经属于你的祖父母……他们每年夏天都会把你送到这里，而你总是没有我就不肯来。我觉得你妈妈只是装作生气，其实并不介意。还记得我们骑着自行车，从尼基塔叔叔的果园里偷苹果吗？我们玩打仗，四处寻宝……我就是在这里遇见尤尔卡的……

text: I loved going here as a kid. It was a rare treat! On some weekends, uncle Misha and aunt Lena would pick us up in their red "Moskvich" and take us here. Mom would always buy me ice-cream so I wouldn't whine or act up. We'd carry large bags home and stuff our faces like it was a New Year's feast. Didn't take much to make us happy back then, did it?
new_translation: 小时候我很喜欢来这里。那可是难得的享受！有些周末，米沙叔叔和莉娜阿姨会开着他们那辆红色“莫斯科人”来接我们，把我们带到这里。妈妈总会给我买冰淇淋，免得我一路抱怨或闹脾气。我们会拎着大包小包回家，然后像过年一样大吃一顿。那时候让我们开心起来真容易，对吧？

text: Haha! Remember this stage? Our homeroom teacher once made us join the school choir 'as a corrective measure'. We had to sing with them at the May Day celebration. Of course we didn't learn any lyrics! Just stood in front of the audience making faces and pretending to sing... And then, the whole front row started pointing at us. I guess our music career ended back then, before it even started!
new_translation: 哈哈！还记得这个舞台吗？我们班主任有一次把我们送进学校合唱团，说是“纠正措施”。五一庆祝活动时，我们还得跟着他们一起唱。当然，我们根本没背歌词！就站在观众面前做鬼脸，假装自己在唱……然后，前排所有人都开始指着我们。我想，我们的音乐生涯大概就在那时结束了，甚至还没真正开始！

text: I never liked our school. It was okay for messing around, but classes were absolute torture. You somehow managed to keep your grades high, but I never could. And honestly, I didn't even try. What I was good at, was getting us both into trouble! And here we are again. Trying to get ourselves out of another mess...
new_translation: 我从来不喜欢我们学校。拿来胡闹倒还行，但上课简直是折磨。你不知怎么总能保持好成绩，我就从来做不到。老实说，我也没真的努力过。我最擅长的，是把我们两个一起拖进麻烦里！而现在，我们又来了，试着从另一个烂摊子里脱身……

new_translation: PM 的改装版本，带有枪口/抑制器支架和附件导轨。

text: A 9x18 submachine gun with a high ammo capacity helical magazine. Compact and reliable, it excels in close-quarters combat.
new_translation: 9×18 口径冲锋枪，配备大容量螺旋弹匣。紧凑可靠，擅长近距离作战。
藏匿版 野牛 描述

text: A compact, lightweight submachine gun chambered in 9x18. It combines high mobility, controllable recoil, and rapid fire. Designed for close-quarters combat.
new_translation: 9×18 口径紧凑轻型冲锋枪，兼具高机动性、可控后坐力与连射能力，专为近距离作战设计。

text: A powerful semi-automatic shotgun chambered in 12 gauge. Great for close-quarters combat, offering rapid fire.
new_translation: 威力强大的12号口径半自动霰弹枪。非常适合近距离作战，射速极快。

text: A semi-automatic carbine chambered in 7.62x39. Durable and accurate, it is suited for mid-range combat.
new_translation: 7.62×39 口径半自动卡宾枪，坚固耐用、精度出色，适合中距离作战。

text: An improved version of semi-automatic sniper rifle chambered in 7.62×51. Offers high accuracy and rapid shots. Designed for marksmen, it suits both urban engagements and open-field operations.
new_translation: 7.62×51 口径改装版半自动狙击步枪，高精度、射速快。专为精确射手设计，适合城市与开阔地带作战。

text: A semi-automatic designated marksman rifle chambered in 7.62x54. Reliable and precise, it is designed for mid- to long-range engagements.
new_translation: 7.62×54 口径半自动精确射手步枪，可靠精准，专为中远距离作战设计。

text: A compact, integrally suppressed sniper rifle chambered in 9x39. Designed for silent, precise operations, it excels at close to mid-range engagements.
new_translation: 一款采用 9×39 子弹的紧凑型内置抑制器狙击步枪。专为无声、精准作战设计，擅长近距离到中距离作战。

A field survival tool. Can be used as cutlery or, in an emergency, in melee combat.
Not suitable for aimed throwing.

野外生存工具。可用作餐具，或在紧急情况下用于近战。
不适合瞄准投掷。

text:
A camping knife that can also be used in close combat.
Not suitable for aimed throwing.

一把露营刀，也可用于近身战斗。

text: They say Explorer 61 wore one just like this.

text: A toy inspired by Explorers' notes about a Radius spawn that never tried to kill them.
new_translation: 受探索者笔记启发制作的玩具，描绘了半径内从未试图伤害人类的特殊存在。

text: A plush toy, handmade by some Explorer long ago to ease their loneliness.
new_translation: 由某位探索者早年手工缝制的毛绒玩具，用以排遣孤独。

text: A toy version of the only friendly spawn of the Radius known from Explorer legends.
new_translation: 根据探索者传说中半径唯一友好存在制作的玩具版本。

text:
• There are three of these toys in total.
• They can be found in shelters and clipped to a carabiner, like a keychain.
new_translation:
• 该系列共有三款玩具。
• 可在避难所中找到，通常挂在登山扣上当作钥匙链。

text: In gratitude to the first one who answered the call – and shall ever remain at the vanguard.
new_translation: 致首位响应召唤的先锋——愿您永驻前沿阵地。

text: Your Supervisor has highly commended your results during the first year of access to the Explorer activity. UNPSC HQ extends its gratitude for your impeccable service.
new_translation: 你的督导员高度评价你在开放探索者活动第一年取得的成果。UNPSC 总部对你的卓越服务致以谢意。

text: Feel honored to have your efforts recognized!
new_translation: 倍感荣幸，您的付出得到了认可！

text: Thank you for venturing together on our bold new journey to the Pechorsk Anomaly!
new_translation: 感谢您与我们共同踏上 Pechorsk 异常区的勇敢新旅程！

text:
A simple object from 1980s Pechorsk, recreated by the Radius in an unstable form.
Studying it may shed light on the altering properties of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation:
一件来自1980年代 Pechorsk 的简单物品，被半径以不稳定形式重构。
研究它可能揭示 Pechorsk 异常物的异变特性。

text: • Exchange it in the Supply Depot for Supply Credits.
new_translation: • 在补给站兑换为补给积分。

new_translation:
左侧垂直大号弹药盒袋。
可安装在任意胸挂、背心或背包上。

text:
Right-side vertical pouch for large ammo boxes.
Place it on any chest rig, vest, or backpack.
new_translation:
右侧垂直大号弹药盒袋。
可安装在任意胸挂、背心或背包上。

text:
A pouch for handgun and rifle magazines.
Place it on any chest rig, vest, or backpack.
new_translation:
手枪和步枪弹匣袋。
可挂在任何胸挂、背心或背包上。

text:
A pouch for handgun magazines.
Place it on any chest rig, vest, or backpack.
new_translation:
手枪弹匣袋。
可挂于胸挂、背心或背包上。

text:
A pouch for carrying multiple miscellaneous items.
Place it on chest rigs and vests only.
new_translation:
用于携带各种杂物的小袋。
仅限胸挂和背心使用。

text:
A hook for helmets, headgear and a few other items.
Place it on any chest rig, vest, or backpack.
new_translation:
用于悬挂头盔、头部装备等物品的挂钩。
可安装在任意胸挂、背心或背包上。

text: Adds an extra slot for items like flashlights, artifact detector, probe feeder, or syringe on any chest rig, vest, or backpack.
new_translation: 为任何胸前装备、背心或背包增加一个额外插槽，用于放置手电筒、异常物探测器、探测仪供料器或注射器等物品。

text:
Lightweight insert plate for any vest.
Slightly reduces incoming damage.
Deteriorates gradually as you take damage.
new_translation:
适用于所有背心的轻型插板。
略微减少所受伤害。
随着承受伤害逐渐损耗。

text:
Medium-weight insert plate for any vest.
Reduces incoming damage.
Deteriorates gradually as you take damage.
new_translation:
适用于所有背心的中型插板。
减少所受伤害。
随着承受伤害逐渐损耗。

text:
Heavyweight insert plate for Heavy Vest only.
Greatly reduces incoming damage.
Deteriorates gradually as you take damage.
new_translation:
仅适用于重型背心的重型插板。
大幅减少所受伤害。
随着承受伤害逐渐损耗。

text:
Heavy helmet with high-level protection and low durability.
Can be used with a Head Flashlight.
new_translation:
重型头盔，防护等级高但耐久度低。
可搭配头戴式手电筒使用。

text:
Lightweight, with low durability and protection. Equipped with two rails for attachments.
Can be used with a Head Flashlight.
new_translation:
重量轻，耐久度和防护性较低。配备两条导轨用于安装配件。
可与头戴式手电筒配合使用。
FAST 头盔（带夜视仪支架）

text:
Average in terms of protection and weight, but with top durability. Equipped with two rails for attachments and a NVD shroud.
Can be used with a Head Flashlight and night vision devices via NVD Mount.
new_translation:
防护性和重量中等，但具有顶级耐久性。配备两条导轨用于安装附件和一个夜视仪支架。
可通过夜视仪支架与头灯和夜视设备配合使用。

text:
A special device designed to activate the process of alteration a living organism.
To be fitted with Artifact Container and Supercapacitor before launch.
new_translation:
一种特殊设备，用于激活活体生物的转化过程。
启动前需安装异常物容器和超级电容器。

text:
• Insert the charged Supercapacitor and the Artifact Container with unstable Artifact into the designated slots.
• Place the Alteration Unit on the marked spot.
• Press the button on the unit to start the alteration process.
• Should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.
new_translation:
• 将已充电的超级电容和装有不稳定异常物的异常物容器放入指定插槽。
• 将转化装置放在标记位置。
• 按下装置上的按钮启动转化。
• 背在背上代替背包使用。

text: A portable device that amplifies the signal in the Committee's Sensor Network, enhancing the accuracy of monitoring in harsh conditions. It aids in detecting unstable entities within the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 一种便携式设备，用于放大委员会传感器网络中的信号，从而提高恶劣条件下监测的准确性。它有助于探测 Pechorsk 异常区内的不稳定实体。

text: • Place on the marked spot to connect it to the UNPSC Sensor Network.
new_translation: • 放置在标记位置以连接到 UNPSC 传感器网络。

text: A device designed to contain unstable Artifacts. Holds one unit. Updated version not subject to the altering effects of its contents.
new_translation: 一种设计用于容纳不稳定异常物的设备。可容纳一个单位。更新版本不受其内容物转化效应的影响。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to open or close. • Use an Advanced Artifact Detector to locate and reveal unstable Artifact from an Invisible Nest. • Quickly place the Artifact inside the Container to lock it in place.
new_translation: • 按下 {BTN_Trigger} 以打开或关闭。 • 使用 高级异常物探测器 定位并揭示隐形巢穴中的不稳定异常物。 • 快速将异常物放入容器中以锁定其位置。

text: A test sample of a device designed to contain unstable Artifacts. Holds one unit. Can be subject to the altering effects of its contents, but retains them within.
new_translation: 一种设计用于容纳不稳定异常物的设备测试样本。可容纳一个单位。可能受其内容物转化效应影响，但仍能将其保留在内。

text: A device that ensures UNPSC's energy independence. It is a supercapacitor that is charged from the Electrostatic Anomaly. Charging process poses a risk of physical harm to the user.
new_translation: 保障 UNPSC 能源独立的装置——利用静电异常充电的超级电容器。充电过程存在对使用者造成人身伤害的风险。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} on your free hand and pull the top to expand. • Move quickly through the Electrostatic Anomaly to cause a discharge and charge it.
new_translation: • 用空闲的手 按下 {BTN_Trigger} 并拉动顶部以展开。 • 快速穿过静电异常以引发放电并为其充电。
UNPSC 门用异常物激活器

text: A special device designed to activate the Door Artifact and trigger the Door Anomaly. The destination of this anomaly is currently under study and requires field testing.
new_translation: 一种专门设计用于激活门之异常物并触发门之异常的装置。该异常的目的地目前正在研究中，需要进行实地测试。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} with your free hand and pull the top lid. • Place the Door Artifact into the device. • Hold {BTN_Trigger} to activate the Door Artifact.
new_translation: • 用空闲的手按下{BTN_Trigger}并拉开顶盖。 • 将门异常物放入装置。 • 长按{BTN_Trigger}激活门异常物。

text: Wearable remote control for the Door Artifact Activator. Designed by the UNPSC to allow the Explorers to operate the Door Artifact Activator at a distance.
new_translation: 门之异常物激活器的可穿戴远程控制器。由 UNPSC 设计，允许探索者在远距离操作门之异常物激活器。
陈旧的 UNPSC 传感器

text: A modernized weather sensor used by the Committee in the 1990s to monitor the Pechorsk Anomaly. It was phased out after the introduction of a new monitoring system.
new_translation: 委员会在20世纪90年代用于监测 Pechorsk 异常的现代化气象传感器。在引入新的监测系统后，该传感器被逐步淘汰。

text: A secured case containing essential equipment for operating the Committee's new monitoring system for the Pechorsk Anomaly and its entities. It can only be carried by hand.
new_translation: 一个安全箱，内含操作委员会针对 Pechorsk 异常区及其实体的新监测系统所需的必要设备。只能手提。

text: A secured container for biological samples, used by the Committee to study the effects of the Pechorsk Anomaly's altering properties on blood and tissues of ordinary individuals.
new_translation: 用于存放生物样本的安全容器，委员会用它来研究 Pechorsk 异常的变异特性对普通个体的血液和组织的影响。

text: A sensor on a folding tripod, designed as part of the Committee's new system for monitoring and researching the Pechorsk Anomaly and its entities.
new_translation: 折叠三脚架上的传感器，作为委员会监测和研究 Pechorsk 异常及其实体的新系统的一部分而设计。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to unfold before placement or fold before carrying. • Place on the marked spot. • Press the button on the Sensor to run measurements. • Can be carried in Primary Holster.
new_translation: • 放置前按下{BTN_Trigger}展开，携带前按同一按钮折叠。 • 放在标记位置。 • 按下传感器上的按钮开始测量。 • 可放在主枪套里携带。

text: A broken sensor for monitoring and researching the Pechorsk Anomaly. It can be carried in the Primary Holster.
new_translation: 用于监测和研究 Pechorsk 异常的损坏传感器。可放置在主枪套中携带。

text: A protected sensor on a folding tripod, designed specifically for monitoring and researching the Distortion Zones of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 折叠三脚架上的受保护传感器，专门设计用于监测和研究 Pechorsk 异常的扭曲领域。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to unfold before placement or fold before carrying. • Place on the marked spot. • Press the button on the Sensor to run measurements. • Can be carried in Primary Holster.
new_translation: • 放置前按下{BTN_Trigger}展开，携带前按同一按钮折叠。 • 放在标记位置。 • 按下传感器上的按钮开始测量。 • 可放在主枪套里携带。

text:
UNPSC proprietary device for testing the Explorer candidates.
Please do not activate the device unless you have a valid evacuation code!
new_translation:
UNPSC 专有装置，用于测试探索者候选人。
除非您拥有有效的撤离代码，否则请勿激活此装置！

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to unfold before placement or fold before carrying. • Place on the marked spot. • Can be carried in Primary Holster.
new_translation: • 放置前按下{BTN_Trigger}展开，携带前按同一按钮折叠。 • 放在标记位置。 • 可放在主枪套里携带。

text: A wristband with code to activate the Terminal Evacuation Device.
new_translation: 腕带上存有代码，用于激活终端撤离装置。

text: A throwing sonde (probe) designed specifically for collecting data on Door Anomalies inside the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 专门设计用于收集 Pechorsk 异常内部门之异常数据的投掷探针（探测器）。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to activate. • Throw it into a Door Anomaly. • Collect the Throwsonde with gathered data.
new_translation: • 按下 {BTN_Trigger} 以激活。 • 将其投入门之异常中。 • 收集已获取数据的投掷探针。

text: A prototype of throwing sonde (probe) designed specifically for collecting data on Door Anomalies inside the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 专门设计用于收集 Pechorsk 异常内部门之异常数据的投掷探针（探测器）原型。

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to activate. • Throw it into a Door Anomaly. • Collect the Throwsonde with gathered data.
new_translation: • 按下 {BTN_Trigger} 以激活。 • 将其投入门之异常中。 • 收集已获取数据的投掷探针。
探索者安全等级 1 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 2 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 3 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 4 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 5 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 6 臂章描述
探索者安全等级 7 臂章描述

text: • Hold {BTN_Trigger} with your free hand and pull to open the lid. • {BTN_Grip} to pull out a piece with your free hand and bring to your mouth to consume.
new_translation: • 用空闲的手按住{BTN_Trigger}拉开盖子。 • 用空闲的手{BTN_Grip}取出一块送到嘴边吃。

text: A highly-nutritions product to sufficiently restore your energy.
new_translation: 高营养产品，可充分恢复您的能量。

text: A regional delicacy for medium energy refill.
new_translation: 当地特色美食，能中等程度补充能量。

text: A healthy snack for sufficient energy refill.
new_translation: 健康零食，能充分补充能量。

text: A great energy refill in just two bites.
new_translation: 仅需两口即可提供极佳的能量补充。

text: • Hold {BTN_Trigger} and pull the wrapper with your free hand to open. • Bring to your mouth to consume.
new_translation: • 按住{BTN_Trigger}，用另一只手撕开包装。 • 送到嘴边吃。

text: A light snack to slightly quench hunger.
new_translation: 轻食小吃，可略微缓解饥饿。

text: • Hold {BTN_Trigger} to open the box. • {BTN_Grip} a cracker with your free hand and bring to your mouth to consume.
new_translation: • 按住{BTN_Trigger}打开盒子。 • {BTN_Grip}用空闲的手取一块饼干并送至嘴边食用。

text: A piece of multifunctional cutlery for UNPSC Explorers.
new_translation: UNPSC 探索者的多功能餐具。

text: Standard health booster for partial recovery but with slow effect.
new_translation: 标准的健康助推器，可部分恢复生命值，但效果较慢。
强力助推器，助您恢复全部生命值。

text: • Hold {BTN_Trigger} and inject yourself in the arm or chest.
A quick booster for partial recovery.
new_translation: 部分恢复生命值的快速助推器。

text: UNPSC health notice: Smoking is harmful to your health.
new_translation: UNPSC 健康通知：吸烟有害健康。

text: A new generation of signature uniforms and accessories that the UNPSC provides to their Explorers for working in the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: UNPSC 为其在 Pechorsk 异常区工作的探索者提供的新一代标志性制服和配件。

text: A handheld Artifact Detector designed to locate valuable Artifacts in the Pechorsk Anomaly. Emits signals to indicate direction and proximity.
new_translation: 手持式异常物探测器，专为在 Pechorsk 异常区定位有价值的异常物而设计。发出信号指示方向和接近程度。

text:
• Audio signal will indicate when an Artifact is nearby.
• Use the indicator's brightness to determine the Artifact's direction.
• Follow the signal's intensity to locate the Artifact.
new_translation:
• 当异常物在附近时，音频信号会发出提示。
• 使用指示器的亮度来判断异常物的方向。
• 跟随信号强度来定位异常物。

text: An Advanced Artifact Detector designed to locate Artifacts in ordinary and invisible Artifact Nests. Emits signals to indicate direction and proximity, and impulse to reveal Invisible Artifact Nests.
new_translation: 一款先进的异常物探测器，用于在普通和隐形异常物巢穴中定位异常物。发射信号指示方向和接近程度，并发出脉冲以揭示隐形异常物巢穴。

text: • Audio signal will indicate when an Artifact is nearby. • Indicator color shows if the Artifact Nest is ordinary or invisible. • Use the indicator's brightness to find the Artifact's direction. • Follow the signal's intensity to locate it. • Press {BTN_Trigger} to activate the revealing impulse.
new_translation: • 当附近有异常物时，音频信号会发出提示。 • 指示器颜色会显示异常物巢穴是普通还是隐形。 • 通过指示器亮度判断异常物方向。 • 根据信号强弱判断它的位置。 • 按下 {BTN_Trigger} 激活显形脉冲。

text: The latest UNPSC headgear, engineered for Explorers' protection inside the hazardous Distortion Zones.
new_translation: 最新的 UNPSC 头盔，专为在危险的扭曲领域内保护探索者而设计。

text: • Wear before entering a Distortion Zone. • Bring close to the head and release to wear. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to take it off. • Track the remaining operating time on your watch. • Wait outside the Distortion Zone for headgear to recharge.
new_translation: • 进入扭曲领域前佩戴。 • 靠近头部并松开即可佩戴。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} 取下。 • 在手表上查看剩余工作时间。 • 在扭曲领域外等待头具充能。

text: The UNPSC prototype headgear designed for protection against the adverse effects of the Distortion Zones.
new_translation: UNPSC 原型头盔，用于抵御扭曲领域的不良影响。

text: A portable touch-screen PC providing easy access to mission briefing, map, and the Explorer's Handbook.
new_translation: 一款便携式触摸屏电脑，提供便捷访问任务简报、地图和探索者手册。

text: Hands-free flashlight can be worn alone or on a Sfera, PASGT or FAST helmet.
new_translation: 免持手电筒可单独佩戴或安装在 Sfera、PASGT 或 FAST 头盔上。

text: • Bring close to a helmet in your other hand and release to attach to a helmet. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} to switch on or off. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to take it off.
new_translation: • 靠近另一只手里的头盔，松手即可吸附。 • 按住{BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger}开关。 • 按住{BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip}取下。

text: A flashlight with a pocket clip. Can be carried in hand or attached to any item slot.
new_translation: 带口袋夹的手电筒。可手持，也可夹在任何物品栏上。

text: Single-use pyrotechnic flare that launches an intense source of illumination.
new_translation: 一次性烟火信号弹，发射强烈的照明光源。

text: • Hold with {BTN_Grip} with one hand pointing away from you. • Hold {BTN_Trigger} with your other hand and pull out the red strap to launch.
new_translation: • 用一只手握住 {BTN_Grip}，指向远离你的方向。 • 用另一只手 按住 {BTN_Trigger} 并拉出红色拉环以发射。

text: Can be used with a Head Flashlight and night vision devices via NVD Mount.
new_translation: 可通过夜视装置支架与头戴式手电筒和夜视设备配合使用。

text: • Bring close to the head and release to wear. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to take it off. • Hold in your hand before attaching a Head Flashlight or NVG Mount.
new_translation: • 靠近头部松手即可戴上。 • 按住{BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip}取下。 • 安装头灯或夜视仪支架前，先拿在手里。
带夜视装置遮光罩的 PASGT 头盔

text:
Medium weight helmet with low durability and protection. Equipped with two rails for attachments and a NVD shroud.
Can be used with a Head Flashlight or NVD Mount with night vision devices.
new_translation:
中等重量，耐久和防护较低。配备两条附件导轨和夜视仪遮光罩。
可搭配头灯或夜视仪支架使用。

text: • Bring close to the NVD Mount and release to attach. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} to switch on or off. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to remove.
new_translation: • 靠近夜视镜支架松开以安装。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} 开关。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} 移除。

text: • Bring close to the NVD Arm and release to attach. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} to switch on or off. • When attached to NVD Arm, hold {BTN_Trigger} and pull to the side to switch the view to the other eye. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to remove.
new_translation: • 靠近夜视镜臂松开以安装。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} 开关。 • 安装至夜视镜臂时，按住 {BTN_Trigger} 并向侧面拉动，可将视野切换至另一只眼睛。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} 移除。

text:
Can be attached to NVD Head Harness, FAST Helmet or PASGT Helmet with NVD Shroud.
Can be used with night vision devices and Monocular NVD Arm.
new_translation:
可安装至夜视头戴系统、FAST 头盔或带有夜视护罩的 PASGT 头盔。
可与夜视设备及单目夜视镜臂配合使用。

text: • Bring close to compatible headgear in your other hand and release to attach. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to remove.
new_translation: • 靠近另一只手中的兼容头部装备松开以安装。 • 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} 移除。

text:
Can be attached to NVD Mount.
Can be used with monocular night vision devices.
new_translation:
可安装于夜视仪支架。
可与单目夜视设备配合使用。

text: • Bring close to the NVD Mount and release to attach. • Hold {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} to remove.
new_translation: • 靠近夜视仪支架并释放以安装。 • 按住{BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip}以移除。

text:
Ground panoramic night vision device with wide FOV.
Can be attached to NVD Mount.
new_translation:
地面全景夜视仪，视野宽广。
可安装至夜视仪支架。

text:
Monocular night vision device with narrow FOV.
Can be attached to Monocular NVD Arm.
new_translation:
单目夜视仪，视野较窄。
可安装至单目夜视仪臂。

text:
Dual tube binocular night vision device with narrow FOV.
Can be attached to NVD Mount.
new_translation:
双管双目夜视仪，视野较窄。
可安装至夜视仪支架。

text:
Single tube binocular night vision device with narrow FOV.
Blocks peripheral vision.
Can be attached to NVD Mount.
new_translation:
单管双目夜视仪，视野较窄。
会遮挡余光视野。
可安装至夜视仪支架。

text: Probe dispenser for locating or discharging anomalies. Can be carried in hand or attached to any item slot.
new_translation: 用于定位或触发异常的探测器分配器。可手持或安装至任何物品槽位。

text: • Hold {BTN_Trigger} to prepare a Probe. • Swing and release Trigger to throw it and locate or descharge anomalies.
new_translation: • 按住 {BTN_Trigger} 准备探测器。 • 挥动并松开扳机 投掷以定位或触发异常。

text: A throwable probe designed for locating and discharging anomalies.
new_translation: 专为定位和触发异常设计的可投掷探测器。

text:
A handheld, portable, two-way radio transceiver capable of operating within the Pechorsk Anomaly. The current version of its communucation protocol supports a maximum of 4 devices per channel.
Can be carried in hand or attached to any item slot.
new_translation:

text: Use a Throwsonde to collect data from Door Anomalies.
new_translation: 使用投掷探针从门异常中收集数据。
穿过门异常，取回已采集数据的投掷探针。

text: Get the Throwsonde from the Terminal.
Activate the Throwsonde and throw it into the Door Anomaly.
new_translation: 激活投掷探针并将其投入门异常。

new_translation: 穿过门异常并收集已收集数据的投掷探针。
