text: The Artifact is missing from the Container. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 容器中的异常物不见了。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've lost the Artifact Detector. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了异常物探测器。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've dropped required item. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你遗落了任务所需物品。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've lost the Distortion-Proof Headgear you can't enter the zone without, go pick it up.
new_translation: 你丢失了抗扭曲头罩。没有它就无法进入该区域，请先把它找回来。

text: Your item is in wrong state.
You've lost items required to complete the mission. Locate them using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了完成任务所需的物品。请使用地图找到它们。

text: You've lost the Artifact. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了异常物。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've lost the Artifact Container. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了异常物容器。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've lost the Supercapacitor. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了超级电容器。请使用地图找到它。

text: You've lost the Door Artifact Activator. Locate it using the Map.
new_translation: 你丢失了门异常物激活器。请使用地图找到它。

text: Bring your watch to the door lock to access Training Ground.
new_translation: 将你的手表靠近门锁 以进入训练场。

text: You can turn off the sound if it disturbs you. Try doing so now.
new_translation: 如果声音打扰到你，可以关闭它。 现在尝试这样做。

text:
Grab the Chest Rig, bring it to your chest
and release to put it on.
new_translation:
抓住胸挂拉到胸前，
松手即可穿戴。

text:
Place the Explorer Tablet
into the slot on the Rig.
new_translation:
将探索者平板电脑
放入装备架的插槽中。

text: To crawl under an obstacle, use {BTN_Crouch} or crouch physically.
new_translation: 要匍匐穿过障碍物， 按{BTN_Crouch} 或者在现实中蹲下。

text: To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip. Grab the Probes from the distance.
new_translation: 要从远处或地面拾取物体， 请按住 {BTN_Trigger} 并按下抓握来选中它。 从远处抓取探测器。

text: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to prepare a Probe. Swing and release Trigger to throw.
new_translation: 按住 {BTN_Trigger}准备一个探测器。 挥动并松开扳机即可投掷。

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Grip to take off the Rig. Hold the Rig in your hand or place it on the dummy to be able to attach the Sidearm Holster or shift other pouches on it.
new_translation: 按住 {BTN_Bottom} 并按下抓握取下胸挂。 将胸挂拿在手中或放到假人身上， 即可安装手枪套 或调整其他收纳袋的位置。

text:
Grab the Sidearm Holster
and bring it to an empty area on the Rig.
Release to place it.
new_translation:
拿起手枪套
并将其带到装备架上的空白区域。
松开以放置。

text: You can remove a pouch from the Rig by holding {BTN_Bottom} and pressing {BTN_Grip}.
new_translation: 你可以通过按住 {BTN_Bottom} 并按下 {BTN_Grip}从装备上取下一个小袋。

text: You can place pouches at any angle. Hold {BTN_Trigger} to adjust the angle and release the pouch to place it on the Rig.
new_translation: 弹匣包可以任意角度放置。 按住{BTN_Trigger}调整角度， 松开弹匣包 即可将其固定在装备上。

text:
Once you're done,
bring the Rig to your chest
and release to put it on.
new_translation:
穿戴完毕后，
将胸挂拉到胸前
松手即可穿上。

text: Insert the magazine into the pistol.
Use Trigger with your other hand and pull to rack the slide back and cock the pistol.
new_translation: 用另一只手按住扳机并拉动套筒，让手枪上膛。

text: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.
new_translation: 射击目标直到弹匣空为止。

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} to eject the magazine or press to drop it.
new_translation: 按住{BTN_Bottom}退出弹匣 或短按丢弃弹匣。

text: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to open the box, and one cartridge will pop out.
new_translation: 按住{BTN_Trigger}打开盒子， 会弹出一发子弹。

text:
Bring the cartridge to the magazine
to begin loading it.
Load the full magazine.
new_translation:
将子弹对准弹匣
开始装填。
装满整个弹匣。

text: Insert the magazine into the pistol.
To close the slide, pull it with the Trigger in your other hand or press {BTN_Top} on the hand holding the gun.
new_translation: 要关闭套筒， 用另一只手按住扳机并拉动套筒， 或用持枪手按下{BTN_Top}。

text: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.
new_translation: 你可以在物品信息中查看物品详情。 用持物手长按{BTN_ItemInfo}即可打开。

text: Place the pistol into the holster on your Rig.
new_translation: 将手枪放入胸挂上的枪套中。

text: Grab the Backpack and move it over non-dominant shoulder and release to move it to your back.
new_translation: 拿起背包，从非惯用手一侧甩过肩膀后松手，背包就会落到背上。

text: Bring your hand over the shoulder and press Grip to take out the Backpack. Release it in front of you. It will automatically snap to your back once you step away.
new_translation: 将手伸到肩膀上方， 并按下抓握取出背包。 在面前松手。你走开后，它会自动吸附回背上。

text: You can hang your Backpack on a rack.
new_translation: 您可以将背包挂在挂架上。

text: When you hang your backpack on a rack, you unequip it – it'll stop snapping to your back. You can also unequip it by holding {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} over the shoulder when you are wearing the backpack.
new_translation: 当你将背包挂在挂架上时，你会卸下它——它将停止吸附到你的背部。 你也可以通过按住 {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip}在肩膀上来卸下背包。

text: Helmet, rig or vest, and backpack you're wearing, and the weapon in your hands take up your own capacity. The heavier they are, the slower you get.
new_translation: 您佩戴的头盔、装备或背心、背包以及手中的武器都会占用您自身的容量。它们越重，您的移动速度就越慢。

text: Hold {BTN_Top} with your empty hand to open Player Info to check your current loadout and how it affects you.
new_translation: 用空手按住{BTN_Top}打开玩家信息， 查看当前装备配置及其对你的影响。

text: To check an item's loadout and other parameters, grab the item and hold {BTN_ItemInfo}.
new_translation: 要查看物品的装备配置和其他参数， 拿起物品并按住{BTN_ItemInfo}。

text: You've just heard the signal that the Mission Objective has been completed.
new_translation: 您刚刚听到任务目标已完成的信号。

text: You can check your new Mission Objective in the Tablet.
new_translation: 您可以在平板电脑中查看新的任务目标。

text: Pass the test to continue the mission.
To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip.
new_translation: 要从远处或地面拾取物体， 请按住 {BTN_Trigger} 并按下抓握来选中它。

text:
Place the Flashlight
into the slot on the Rig.
new_translation:
将手电筒
放入装备的插槽中。

text: Use {BTN_Trigger} to switch on/off the Flashlight.
new_translation: 使用 {BTN_Trigger} 打开/关闭手电筒。

text:
To assemble the gun,
first put its frame into the vise.
new_translation:
要组装枪支，
首先要将枪架放入虎钳中。

text:
Grab the pistol grip
and bring it close to the frame in the vise
to install.
new_translation:
抓住手枪式握把，
将其靠近虎钳中的枪架
进行安装。

text:
For this shotgun,
the handguard can only be installed
onto the barrel.
new_translation:
对于这款霰弹枪来说，
护木只能安装在
枪管上。

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove a part from the gun in the vise.
new_translation: 按住 {BTN_Bottom} + 抓握，即可从台钳上的枪械移除部件。

text: You can attach or remove attachments without a vise. Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove an attachment.
new_translation: 你可以不用台钳直接安装或移除配件。按住 {BTN_Bottom} + 抓握即可移除配件。

text: To turn on/off an attachment mounted on a weapon, Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Trigger.
new_translation: 要开关安装在武器上的配件，按住 {BTN_Bottom} + 扳机。

text: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.
new_translation: 你可以在物品信息中查看物品详情。 用持物手长按{BTN_ItemInfo}即可打开。

text:
All weapons have durability and require cleaning.
Put the PM into the vise.
new_translation:
所有武器都有耐久度并需要清洁。
将 PM 放入台钳。

text: Lower durability means worse weapon parameters and higher chance of malfunction.
new_translation: 耐久度越低，武器参数越差，发生故障的几率越高。

text: To restore durability, spray oil on the weapon and then scrub it with a brush to remove dirt.
new_translation: 要恢复耐久度，先在武器上喷洒油，然后用刷子擦洗以去除污垢。

text: Some weapons consist of different parts, each with its own durability. These parts gather dirt at different rates and affect the weapon in different ways.
new_translation: 部分武器由多个部件组成，各有独立耐久度。不同部件积污速度各异，对武器的影响也不尽相同。

text: You can check the durability of a weapon or weapon part in Item Info.
new_translation: 您可以在物品信息中查看武器或武器部件的耐久度。

text: Keep an eye on your weapon and maintain it regularly.
new_translation: 请密切关注您的武器并定期维护。

text: Results of the Pechorsk Anomaly's attempts to recreate the material world of Pechorsk. These are altered copies of real objects absorbed by the Anomaly at the moment of its manifestation in 1987. Typically appear as small household items with unstable surface. They have no obvious active anomalous properties and are generally unsuitable for normal use. Any potential hidden properties are subject to study by the Committee.
new_translation: Pechorsk 异常尝试重构物质世界的结果。这些是异常在1987年显现时吸收的真实物体的变异副本。通常表现为表面不稳定的小型日常物品。它们没有明显的主动异常特性，通常不适合正常使用。任何潜在的隐藏特性需由委员会进行研究。

text: You! Reach the center of the Radius. They are expecting you, outside and within. It is time. Begin your journey into the Radius.
new_translation: 你！前往半径的中心。内外皆在期盼。时候到了。踏上你在半径中的旅程吧。

text: Warning! Stop! You are approaching the perimeter of the Pechorsk Security Zone. This area is supervised by the UNPSC.
new_translation: 警告！停下！你正在接近 Pechorsk 安全区的边界。该区域由联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会监管。

text: If you understand this, proceed to the marked area and raise your hands!
new_translation: 如果你听懂了，前往标记区域并举起双手！

text: Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.
new_translation: 已授予进入联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会探索者基地的权限。

text: Upon exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, you may experience physical discomfort or memory loss. These conditions are temporary. Here at the UNPSC Facility, you are safe and under constant supervision. Please proceed to the Command Room for further instructions.
new_translation: 离开 Pechorsk 异常后，你可能会经历身体不适或记忆丧失。这些状况是暂时的。在联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会基地内，你是安全的，并处于持续监控之下。请前往指挥室接受进一步指示。

text: This is the Command Room. The Terminal here provides a direct link to UNPSC Headquarters.
new_translation: 这是指挥室。此处的终端提供与联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会总部的直接联系。
唤醒序列启动 | 低温舱退出
恢复启动。正在修复区块...

text: Welcome to the United Nations Pechorsk Special Committee!
new_translation: 欢迎来到联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会！

text: We regret to inform you that your former hometown of Pechorsk no longer exists. It was lost in 1987, consumed by the emergence of the Pechorsk Anomaly, also known as the Radius.
new_translation: 我们遗憾地通知你，你曾经的家乡 Pechorsk 已不复存在。它于1987年消失，被出现的 Pechorsk 异常（也称为半径）吞噬。

text: You are now in the Pechorsk Security Zone, at the UNPSC Explorers Facility 27.
new_translation: 你现在位于 Pechorsk 安全区内的联合国 Pechorsk 特别委员会第27号探索者基地。

text: You have also been exposed to the Radius and are now considered Altered: you don't get sick, don't age, and you come back to life in case of dying.
new_translation: 你同样暴露于半径之中，现被视为变异者：你不会生病、不会衰老，死后还会复活。

text: You are also capable of entering and exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, but travelling far from it will result in permanent death.
new_translation: 你还能进出 Pechorsk 异常区，但远离它会导致永久死亡。

text: Your past life is over. Your future now depends on our collaborative efforts. You are invited to make a personal contribution to our research of the Pechorsk Anomaly as a UNPSC Field Explorer.
new_translation: 你的过去已结束。你的未来如今取决于我们的共同努力。作为 UNPSC 实地探索者，你受邀为我们的 Pechorsk 异常区研究做出个人贡献。

text: To confirm your ability to enter and exit the Radius under any circumstances, you must undergo a verification procedure. All you need to do is enter the Pechorsk Anomaly and activate the designated verification device.
new_translation: 为确认你在任何情况下进出半径的能力，你必须进行验证程序。你只需进入 Pechorsk 异常区并激活指定的验证设备。

text: Please put on the coded wristband, leave the Facility, and enter the provided code into the Terminal Evacuation Device awaiting you at the nearest segment of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Keep in mind that the Radius is full of hazards. It is devoid of any sentient beings and almost all anomalous phenomena are lethal. Do not deviate from your objective, and exercise extreme caution.
new_translation: 请戴上编码腕带，离开基地，并在距你最近的 Pechorsk 异常区区段中，找到等待你的撤离终端设备，输入提供的代码。请记住，半径充满危险。那里没有任何智慧生命，几乎所有异常都是致命的。不要偏离任务目标，务必极度谨慎。

text: Glad to see you again. I know a lot of this might look familiar, but trust me, it isn't.
new_translation: 很高兴再次见到你。我知道这些可能看起来很熟悉，但相信我，并非如此。

text: And we're not the same anymore. You are Altered. I'm your Guide. You still look human, but I'm...
new_translation: 而且我们也不再相同了。你是变异者。我是你的向导。你看起来仍然像人类，但我...

text: On the bright side, I have places like this. You can use them to move around in the Radius. Outside of them it's deadly. And you won't find food or water. So for now, play nice with the Committee, or they'll lock you out of the Facility.
new_translation: 好在，我有这样的地方。你可以用它们在半径内移动。在这些地方之外是致命的。而且你找不到食物或水。所以目前，好好配合委员会，否则他们会将你锁在基地之外。

text: See this rope going into the fog? That's where you're going.
new_translation: 看到这根伸进雾中的绳子了吗？那就是你要去的地方。

text: Attention! Stop! You are... Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.
new_translation: 注意！停下！你是... UNPSC 探索者基地的访问权限已授予。
欢迎使用 UNPSC 系统！
//正在运行 UNPSC_EFOS 组件相关性检查。
正在连接到 UNPSC 总部服务器...

text:
UNPSC server data successfully
downloaded to Terminal.
new_translation:
UNPSC 服务器数据
已成功下载至终端。

text: Supervisor's attention is required to proceed.
new_translation: 需要主管关注才能继续。

text: Please remain where you are and wait for an authorized UNPSC employee to connect with you.
new_translation: 请留在原地，等待授权的 UNPSC 员工与您联系。

text: Can I start now? Alright then... Hello! My name is Eva. I'm the Junior Explorer Relations Specialist for The Committee, and your supervisor. I hope you can hear and understand me... Nod and wave your hand if you can – we can see you.
new_translation: 可以开始了吗？好吧……你好！我叫伊娃，是委员会的初级探索者关系专员，也是你的监督员。希望你能听见并理解我……如果可以，请点点头、挥挥手。我们能看到你。

text: Right, so... On behalf of the Committee, we apologize for the verification procedure you were subjected to. We needed to confirm that you possess the key abilities of an altered human and can use them in Explorer's work. We hope, that...
new_translation: 那么……我代表委员会，为你刚才经历的验证程序向你道歉。我们必须确认你具备异变者的关键能力，并且能将这些能力用于探索者工作。我们希望……

text: Listen, I'm sorry. I can't even imagine what it's like – to just suddenly find out you're in the future, and everything you had... is all in the past... And then get blown up for some test. Anyway, you've passed the evaluation. And that shouldn't happen again.
new_translation: 听着，我很抱歉。我甚至无法想象那是什么感受：突然发现自己来到了未来，曾经拥有的一切……都已经留在过去……然后又因为某项测试被炸飞。总之，你通过了评估。那种事不该再发生了。

text: Now it's time to officially make you an Explorer... I-I click here, right?
new_translation: 现在该正式让你当探索者了... 我、我点这儿，对吧？

text: That's your new uniform. Go ahead, get changed, I'm... we're not looking.
new_translation: 那是你的新制服。去吧，换衣服，我... 我们不会看的。

text: Seems a bit loose, but it'll do. Right. Watch activated, readings are nominal.
new_translation: 看起来有点宽松，但没问题。好了。手表已激活，读数正常。

text: Sorry about this, but we can't just trust you and hand everything over at once. You'll need to prove yourself by completing tasks. Your Security Level will rise accordingly, and your permissions will expand. Simply do your job, and you'll be fine. But first, you'll need to pass sort of a Boot Camp. Accept your first mission – and let's do this! Good luck, Explorer!
new_translation: 抱歉，但我们不能一上来就完全信任你，把所有权限都交给你。你需要通过完成任务来证明自己。你的安全等级会随之提升，权限也会逐步开放。做好你的工作，就不会有问题。不过首先，你得通过一次类似新兵训练营的考验。接受你的第一个任务吧。开始行动！祝你好运，探索者。
首要任务：探索者基础训练

text: Complete the Basic Training and receive Explorer Starter Kit.
new_translation: 完成基础训练并获得探索者入门套件。

text: Enter the Training Ground and follow the instructions.
new_translation: 进入训练场并听从指示。

text: Locate and collect the training item during the test.
new_translation: 在测试过程中定位并收集训练物品。

text: Complete the test by achieving the required score.
new_translation: 通过达到所需分数完成测试。

text: Deliver the training item to the Terminal
new_translation: 将训练物品运送至终端

text: Deliver the training item to the Terminal in the Command Room.
new_translation: 将训练物品运送至指挥室中的终端。

text: To access the Facility premises, use the Explorer's Watch. If you do not have an activated Explorer's Watch, please return to the Command Room and follow your supervisor's instructions.
new_translation: 要进入基地场地，请使用探索者手表。如果你没有激活的探索者手表，请返回指挥室并遵循主管指示。

text: Welcome to the Basic Explorer Training Course! Here, you will be issued and trained to use the standard UNPSC Explorer gear. You will undergo a brief test to evaluate the provided equipment and applied knowledge. Please follow all instructions and take sensible precautions!
new_translation: 欢迎参加探索者基础训练课程！在这里，你将领取标准 UNPSC 探索者装备，并学习如何使用。随后你会接受一次简短测试，用来评估这些装备以及你对相关知识的掌握情况。请遵循所有指令，并保持必要的谨慎。

text: To make carrying weapons and equipment more convenient, you can place Pouches and Holsters on the Chest Rig as you wish. To arrange and reposition Pouches on the Rig, you must hold it in your hand or hang it on a dummy. Grab the Sidearm Holster and place it on the Chest Rig wherever you want.
new_translation: 为了更方便地携带武器和装备，你可以按自己的习惯把弹匣包和枪套安装到胸挂上。若要在胸挂上摆放或重新调整这些配件，需要先把胸挂拿在手中，或挂到假人身上。拿起手枪枪套，把它放到胸挂上你想要的位置。

text: For confronting the hostile entities of the Pechorsk Anomaly the Explorers are issued firearms. Proficiency in their handling is critical for your survival. Take the provided gun and insert the magazine. Release the safety and rack the slide to make it ready to fire.
new_translation: 为对抗 Pechorsk 异常区的敌对实体，探索者会获发枪支。熟练操作这些枪支对你的生存至关重要。拿起提供的枪支并插入弹匣。解除保险并拉动滑套使其准备开火。

text: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.
new_translation: 达到指定分数即可通过测试。

text: Not too bad. I hope this will help you out in the Radius. I mean, you won't die permanently there, but it might be unpleasant either way.
new_translation: 还不错。希望这能帮你在半径里派上用场。就是说，你不会真的死在那儿，但滋味也不好受。

text: Reload the gun with the provided ammunition.
new_translation: 使用提供的弹药重新装填枪支。

text: Know your weapon. Monitor its condition and keep track of your ammunition.
new_translation: 了解您的武器。监控其状况并跟踪弹药情况。

text: For carrying gear that doesn't need to be at hand all the time, as well as collected items, Explorers are issued special backpacks. Backpacks have limited capacity and can be outfitted with extra holsters and pouches. Remember that every item you wear or carry affects your capacity. These include your helmet, rig, vest, backpack, and weapon. The heavier they are, the slower you move. For your convenience, the Facility provides various storage solutions for weapons and equipment.
new_translation: 对于不需要随时携带的装备以及收集的物品，探索者会获得特殊背包。背包容量有限，但可以配备额外的枪套和袋子。请记住，你穿戴或携带的每一件物品都会影响你的容量。这包括你的头盔、装备带、背心、背包和武器。它们越重，你的移动速度就越慢。为了方便起见，基地为武器和装备提供了各种存储解决方案。

text: This is the Explorer's Tablet. It contains a Map, a list of accepted Missions, built-in lighting, and the Explorer's Handbook with useful information. Have a look and take it with you.
new_translation: 这是探索者的平板电脑。它包含地图、已接受任务列表、内置照明以及包含有用信息的探索者手册。请查看并随身携带。

text: You will now demonstrate the knowledge and skills you've acquired in a controlled, safe environment. Neutralize all targets and collect the required equipment to pass the test. Missing your shots or getting hit by the anomaly mock-ups will reduce your final score.
new_translation: 接下来，你将在受控且安全的环境中展示已经掌握的知识和技能。消灭所有目标，并收集指定装备即可通过测试。射击失误或被异常模拟物击中都会降低你的最终得分。
UNPSC 探索者训练课程测试

text:
Please demonstrate your skills in shooting enemies, avoiding anomalies, and securing specified items.
Passing this test is required for Security Level 1 clearance.
new_translation:
请展示你在射击敌人、避开异常以及获取指定物品方面的技能。
通过此测试是获得安全等级1许可的必要条件。

text:
Locate and collect
the specified items
new_translation:
定位并收集
指定物品

text: To finish the test, complete the primary objective.
new_translation: 要完成测试，请完成主要目标。

text:
Hit all targets
with minimum misses
new_translation:
命中所有目标
尽量减少脱靶

text:
Navigate the area
discharging the Anomalies
new_translation:
穿越区域
清除异常
UNPSC 探索者训练课程测试

text:
You have successfully passed the UNPSC Explorer Basic Training Test.

Please proceed to the next room to complete the course.
new_translation:
你已成功通过 UNPSC 探索者基础训练测试。

请前往下一个房间完成课程。

text: Alright, are you ready? Let's see what you're capable of.
new_translation: 好了，准备好了吗？看看你有多大能耐。

text: Test complete! Congratulations on successfully completing the Basic Explorer Training Course! Finalize your Explorer Starter Kit by attaching the issued Dump Pouch to your Chest Rig and collecting the provided consumables. The pouch can be used for empty magazines and miscellaneous items.
new_translation: 测试完成！恭喜你成功完成基础探索者训练课程！请将发放的杂物袋安装到你的胸挂装备带上，并领取提供的消耗品，以完善你的探索者入门套件。该袋子可用于存放空弹匣和杂物。

text: Well... You did good! All this should keep you alive in the Pechorsk Anomaly. Now, head back to the Command Room and complete your current mission! There's a promotion waiting.
new_translation: 嗯……干得不错！有了这些装备，你应该能在 Pechorsk 异常区活下来。现在，返回指挥室完成当前任务吧！有晋升机会在等着你。

text: Explorers use chest rigs and vests to carry weapons and gear. Wear this chest rig and put the tablet in the designated slot.
new_translation: 探索者用胸挂和背心来携带武器和装备。穿上这件胸挂，把平板放进指定插槽。

text: The Pocket Flashlight is an essential piece of the Explorer's gear. You can hold it in your hand or attach to your chest or any other equipment slot. Take the Flashlight and place it into your chest slot.
new_translation: 袖珍手电是探索者装备中的关键工具。你可以手持它，或将其固定在胸前及其他装备插槽。取出手电放入胸前插槽。

text: Right... we seem to have a technical issue on our end. The belt's dead. Can you try and reach the flashlight on your own? You won't be able to proceed without it.
new_translation: 好吧……我们这边好像出了点技术问题。传送带不动了。你能自己想办法拿到手电吗？没有它你没法继续。

text: Use the flashlight to get through this section.

The Radius is full of hazards. The most common type is anomalies. They vary in form and behavior. Most of them can be detected or discharged by throwing special Probes. Take the Probe Feeder and discharge the interactive anomaly mock-up. This will unlock the exit.
new_translation: 「半径」区域内充满危险，最常见的是异常。它们形态各异、行为多变，绝大多数可通过投掷专用探测棒进行侦测或消除。拿起探测棒供给器，消除交互式异常模型。完成后出口将解锁。

text: Well, let's hope you're ready. As an Explorer, your role is to venture into the Pechorsk Anomaly, collect artifacts, complete missions, and discover various objects of interest. It may sound mundane, but trust me, all of this serves our ultimate goal. You aren't just collecting random samples. This matters for all of humanity! But we'll talk more about that later. Now, you have been granted your first Security Level. Congratulations!
new_translation: 那么，希望你已经准备好了。作为探索者，你的职责是深入 Pechorsk 异常区，收集异常物、完成任务、发掘各类重要物品。听起来或许平凡，但请相信，这一切都服务于我们的终极目标。你并非在随意收集样本——这关乎全人类的命运！具体细节我们稍后再谈。现在，你已获得首个安全等级授权。恭喜！

text: With this promotion, you have access to most of the Facility. Now you have a place to stay and upgrade your weapons and gear. Of course, you'll have to earn all that along the way. For now, you're free to look around the Facility or head out to secure your first artifact.
new_translation: 此次晋升使你获准进入基地大部分区域。现在你有了休整场所，并能升级武器装备。当然，这一切都需要你在探索途中争取。此刻，你可以自由参观基地，或立即出发获取第一件异常物。

text: This is the Dormitory. Here, UNPSC Explorers can store their equipment, rest, eat, and sleep until a set time. There's also a healing shower for recovery and a gun vise for weapon maintenance.
new_translation: 这里是宿舍区。UNPSC 探索者可以在这里存放装备、休息吃饭、定时睡觉。还有治疗淋浴可以恢复体力，以及枪架可以维护武器。

text: This is the Supply Depot. Explorers can submit their findings from the Radius and unnecessary gear into these Terminals to receive Supply Credits.
new_translation: 这里是补给站。探索者可以将从半径中获得的发现以及不需要的装备提交给这些终端，以换取补给积分。

text: Here, Explorers can obtain guns, gear, and supplies available at their Security Level in exchange for Supply Credits. To obtain items, pick them up and confirm your choice on the Computer.
new_translation: 在这里，探索者可以使用补给积分兑换符合其安全等级可用的枪支、装备和补给品。要获取物品，请拾取它们并在电脑上确认你的选择。

text: Warning! The use of any items inside the Supply Depot is strictly prohibited!
new_translation: 警告！严禁在补给站内使用任何物品！
首要任务：首次异常物回收

text: Secure your first Artifact using the Artifact Detector.
new_translation: 使用异常物探测器确保您的第一件异常物安全。

text: Get the Artifact Detector from the Terminal in the Command Room.
new_translation: 从指挥室的终端处获取异常物探测器。

text: Locate the Artifact Nest using the Artifact Detector and collect the Artifact.
new_translation: 使用异常物探测器定位异常物巢穴并收集异常物。
将异常物送至 27 号基地

text: Deliver the Artifact to the Terminal in the Command Room at Facility 27.
new_translation: 将异常物送至27号基地指挥室的终端处。

text: We need artifacts to study the properties of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Especially those able to change matter itself. We want to understand how the Radius creates altered objects including... well, including the Altered like you.
new_translation: 我们需要异常物来研究 Pechorsk 异常的特性。特别是那些能够改变物质本身的。我们想了解半径如何创造出改变后的物体，包括……嗯，包括像你这样的异变者。

text: Our progress over the past years has been substantial, and I hope we're on the brink of a breakthrough that could alter all of humanity.
new_translation: 过去几年我们的进展巨大，我希望我们正处在一个可能改变全人类的突破边缘。

text: And you... you might play a key role in that, just as Explorer 61 did in his time.
new_translation: 而你……你可能在其中扮演关键角色，就像探索者61在他那个时代所做的一样。

text: Oh, I almost forgot! Don't get caught in the Tide! Once your Tablet starts beeping loudly – get out of the Radius immediately! I know death isn't the end for you, but still... it won't be pleasant. Good luck!
new_translation: 哦，我差点忘了！别被困在潮汐中！一旦你的平板电脑开始大声哔哔作响——立即离开半径！我知道死亡对你来说并非终结，但即便如此……那也不会愉快。祝你好运！

text: There's our hero! Already running missions, finding trinkets for the Committee, and rotting at the Facility until you lose your mind from dying and coming back over and over again. Just like they want.
new_translation: 我们的英雄来了！已经在执行任务了，为委员会寻找小玩意儿，然后在基地里腐烂，直到你因为一次次死亡和复活而发疯。就像他们希望的那样。

text: I have a better option. The strange figure that spoke to you can change everything. If we reach the center of the Radius, we can escape this place. No more Radius, no more Committee. I'm sure of it.
new_translation: 我有个更好的选择。那个跟你说话的奇怪身影可以改变一切。如果我们到达半径的中心，我们就能逃离这个地方。不再有半径，不再有委员会。我确信这一点。

text: Wait... You don't remember me, do you? I'm Lauri! Your old friend! The Radius brought the two of us back to life. And now we share the same goal.
new_translation: 等等……你不记得我了，是吗？我是劳里！你的老朋友！半径让我们俩都复活了。现在我们有着共同的目标。

text: I saw they gave you a tablet. Let me see it.
new_translation: 我看到他们给了你一个平板电脑。让我看看。

text: Just put it here. Did you leave it at the Facility?
new_translation: 就把它放在这里。你是不是把它落在基地里了？

text: I'll leave a note, so you remember our plan... Aaand... done!
new_translation: 我会留张便条，这样你就能记住我们的计划了……然后……搞定！

text: Ha! It worked! I can never get used to this. Can't pick anything up, can't grab a bite, or even have a smoke... I miss having a real body! Okay, that's it.
new_translation: 哈！成功了！我总是没法习惯这个。没法捡起任何东西，没法吃口东西，甚至没法抽根烟……我真想念有个真实身体的时候！好了，就这样吧。

text: You've begun running errands for the Committee, right? We can use this to our advantage.
new_translation: 你已经开始为委员会跑腿了，对吧？我们可以利用这一点。

text: Keep playing their game for the time being while I look for a way to the center. Stock up on gear and get ready for our escape.
new_translation: 暂时继续玩他们的游戏，同时我去找通往中心的路。囤积装备，为我们的逃脱做好准备。

text: Now go. Hope they don't blow you up this time!
new_translation: 现在去吧。希望这次他们不会把你炸飞！

text: Get armed and equipped by working for the Committee. Together with your Guide, find a path to the Heart of the Radius.
new_translation: 通过为委员会效力来武装和装备自己。与向导一同，找到通往半径核心的路。

text: Keep discovering new seсtors until you reach the heart of the Radius.
new_translation: 不断发现新的区域，直到抵达半径核心。

text: Giving up on that artifact? They might not let you back empty-handed.
new_translation: 不拿那个异常物了？他们可不会让你空手回来。

text: You won't get anything from them if you don't complete their missions.
new_translation: 不完成任务的话，他们什么好处都不会给你。

text: Got what they wanted, good. The Committee will be pleased!
new_translation: 拿到他们想要的东西了，不错。委员会肯定很高兴！

text: Okay, let's see what you get in return.
I can't move around like you. But I can be in several places at once.
new_translation: 我没法像你一样四处走动。但我可以同时出现在好几个地方。

text: Too bad I can't just pop up anywhere anytime...
new_translation: 可惜我不能随时随地突然出现……

text: Great work! What a find! Wish I could go into the Radius myself and get a real artifact! But... I'm just an ordinary human. Not Altered. Definitely not someone who should be going in there. I guess it's better if everyone sticks to what they're good at. Speaking of which, you've earned a promotion! Congratulations!
new_translation: 干得漂亮！真是个了不起的发现！真希望我自己能进入半径，拿到一个真正的异常物！但是……我只是个普通人。不是变异者。绝对不是应该进入那里的人。我想，如果每个人都各司其职会更好。说到这个，你得到了晋升！恭喜！

text: I hope this new gear comes in handy – we've still got so much to do! I think we'll make a great team. Who knows, maybe we'll even get our hands on the Golden Sphere! But let's not jump ahead. Go on, check out with your new toys and get back to the missions.
new_translation: 希望这些新装备真能派上用场，我们还有一大堆事要做！我觉得我们会成为很棒的搭档。谁知道呢，也许哪天我们真能把黄金球体弄到手！不过先别想太远。去吧，熟悉一下你的新玩具，然后继续任务。

text: This is the Armory. Here, Explorers can store their weapons, ammunition, and gear. The Armory is also equipped with gunsmithing and cleaning workplaces.
new_translation: 这里是军械库。在这里，探索者可以存放他们的武器、弹药和装备。军械库还配备了枪械改装和清洁工作台。

text: Find a path to the new sector and place the equipment on the marked spot.
new_translation: 找到通往新区域的路径，并将设备放置在标记地点。

text: Get the Amplifier from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端获取信号放大器。

text: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 找到通往 Pechorsk 异常新区域的路径。

text: Find the Compass Artifact in the Anomaly Cluster marked on the map.
new_translation: 在地图标记的异常集群中找到指南针异常物。

text: Hold the Compass Artifact close to your palm to absorb it.
new_translation: 将指南针异常物贴近掌心吸收。

text: Reach the exit from the current sector.
Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.
new_translation: 握住劳里的手，让他把你拉入交界之地。

text: Cross the in-between to the next sector
new_translation: 穿越交界之地前往下一个区域

text: Light the Lamps and follow the Compass to navigate in the in-between.
new_translation: 点亮提灯，跟随罗盘在交界之地中导航。

text: Place the Ampifier on the marked spot.
new_translation: 将信号放大器放置在标记位置。

text: Reach the shortcut to the Facility.
Return to the Facility and complete the mission.
The Pechorsk Anomaly is massive and made up of multiple sectors. And so far, you've only seen one of them. We know that the altered like you can move between them.
new_translation: Pechorsk 异常区规模巨大，由多个区域构成。到目前为止，你只见过其中一个。我们知道像你这样的变异者能在区域间移动。

text: Honestly... I have no idea how you do it. It's still a mystery to us. But right now, you must reach the next sector. I hope you can make it! We need it to carry out further research.
new_translation: 说实话……我完全不知道你是怎么做到的。这对我们来说还是个谜。但现在你得赶到下一个区域。希望你能成功！我们需要它来继续研究。

text: To move on, we've gotta go through the "in-between." It's always wrapped in Fog, more unstable, and full of traps.
new_translation: 要继续前进，我们必须穿过“交界之地”。那里总是笼罩着迷雾，更不稳定，且布满陷阱。

text: It's easy to get lost in there. Crossing it will require moving in a specific pattern. But first, you need to find a slightly unusual artifact. I'll tell you what to do with it.
new_translation: 在那里很容易迷路。穿越它需要按特定模式移动。但首先，你需要找到一个有点不寻常的异常物。我会告诉你如何处理它。

text: I can sense it nearby. Let me mark the spot on the map...
new_translation: 我能感觉到它就在附近。让我在地图上标记位置……

text: That's it! It'll help you follow me through the in-between. This artifact is special. You can... absorb it. Go on, place it on your hand?
new_translation: 就是这个！它会帮你跟随我穿越交界之地。这个异常物很特别。你可以……吸收它。来，把它放在手上？

text: Yeah, like that! It's now a part of you. You'll have to use it while we're in the in-between. Might need it more than once. I'll mark the passage for you right away.
new_translation: 对，就是这样！它现在是你的一部分了。在交界之地时你得用它。可能不止用一次。我马上为你标记通道。

text: Look, here's the passage. If we pull this off, it's yours. Anytime you need to get to the next sector, it'll be right here. Our first real step towards the heart of the Radius. Ready? Let's do this.
new_translation: 看，通道就在这儿。如果我们成功了，它就归你了。以后你需要去下一个区域的时候，随时从这儿走。这是我们迈向半径核心真正的第一步。准备好了吗？开始吧。

text: There are special spots with lamps... You have to move through them in the right order to get across. No idea why it works like this but it does. We're right next to one of them. Light the lamp, so I can figure out where we go next.
new_translation: 有些特殊位置设有提灯……你必须按正确顺序穿过它们才能通过。不知道为何如此运作，但确实有效。我们就在其中一个旁边。点亮提灯，这样我才能确定下一步方向。

text: Yeah! Now use that artifact compass in your hand. Look at your palm.
new_translation: 好！现在用你手上的那个异常物罗盘。看着你的手掌。

text: I connected it to the next lamp. Is it working? Hmm, even the compass doesn't work properly here. We don't have a choice, see if you can follow it. I'll meet you at the next spot. If you turn back, I'll be at the passage, too.
new_translation: 有些地方有提灯……你得按正确顺序经过它们才能通过。不知道为什么，但就是管用。我们旁边就有一个。点亮提灯，我好看看接下来往哪走。

text: You made it! That thing's handy, right? What would you do without me! See that bridge ahead? Packed with cars and anomalies like an obstacle course...
new_translation: 成功抵达！那玩意儿很实用对吧？没有我你可怎么办！看到前方那座桥了吗？挤满了车辆和异常，简直像障碍赛道……

text: Hey. The next spot is over there. You'll have to find your way through this rift. No idea what might be hiding there. If you hear voices or anything strange, ignore them. And don't turn around! There are road signs all over the place... Must be there for a reason. Guess someone doesn't want us to get lost in there.
new_translation: 嘿。下个地点就在那边。你得想办法穿过这道裂隙。不知道里面藏着什么。如果听到人声或任何奇怪的声音，别理它。还有，千万别回头！到处都是路标……肯定有原因。估计有人不想让我们在里面迷路。

text: Glad you made it! Easy to get lost in there walking in circles... until you'd rather put a bullet in your head... Be careful, there are Mimics lying in ambush ahead.
new_translation: 很高兴你成功通过！那片区域容易让人绕圈子迷路……直到你恨不得给自己脑袋来一枪……小心，前面有拟态体埋伏着。

text: You did it! See, we make a good team. Light the last lamp and let's get out of here! Here's the exit from the in-between.
new_translation: 干得漂亮！看吧，我们很有默契。点亮最后一盏提灯，然后离开这里！这是通往交界之地外面的出口。

text: See? Step by step, we'll reach the center and get out of here. Here's a new sector. You can use this passage whenever you need it. Won't have to fight through the in-between again, I can just send you here. At least this much I can do. Now you'll have to deal with the mission they gave you. And I'll look for a shortcut back. It should be nearby.
new_translation: 看吧？一步一步来，我们迟早会抵达中心，离开这里。这是新的区域。需要时你随时可以使用这条通道，不用再一路杀穿交界之地；我可以直接把你送到这里。至少这点我还能做到。现在你得先处理他们交给你的任务。我会去找回来的捷径，应该就在附近。

text: Job's done? Good. I found a path that leads outside... straight into the Committee's arms. Turns out they aren't all that bad. I like Eva too, but... Whatever their good intentions, you can't keep dying for them forever, right? I'm not gonna let that happen. If we want to change it, our only way out is through the center. I'll mark the new passage on your map. Let's head back.
new_translation: 任务完成了？很好。我找到了一条通往外面的路……不过会直接把你送进委员会怀里。结果他们也没那么糟。我也挺喜欢伊娃，可是……不管他们的初衷有多好，你总不能永远替他们去死，对吧？我不会让这种事发生。想改变这一切，我们唯一的出路就在中心。我会把新通道标到你的地图上。我们先回去。

text: Welcome back! I don't know how, but you did it! I've heard some Explorers rely on a voice in their head during missions like this. Sounds insane, but after everything we've learned about the Radius, nothing surprises me anymore... This new sector was closer to the center of the Pechorsk Anomaly. It's stranger and more valuable to our work. I've got a whole plan lined up for researching it! Right now you're not quite ready for the next Top Priority Mission. But you should be able to build experience fast through secondary missions. Good luck, Explorer 73!
new_translation: 欢迎回来！我不知道你是怎么做到的，但你成功了！我听说有些探索者在执行此类任务时会依赖脑海中的声音。听起来很疯狂，但自从我们了解半径的一切后，没有什么能再让我感到惊讶了……这个新区块更靠近 Pechorsk 异常区的中心。它对我们工作来说更奇特且更有价值。我已经制定了一整套研究计划！目前你还未完全准备好执行下一个首要任务。但你应该能通过次要任务快速积累经验。祝你好运，73号探索者！

text: Before you go any further I gotta warn you about the Tide. This thing brings back all the monsters you've killed, and it will kill you if you don't get away in time. When the Tide is close, you either get out of the Radius or hide in one of my shelters. Let me mark a spot on the map. I'll show you around when you get there.
new_translation: 在你继续深入之前，我必须警告你关于潮汐的事。这东西会复活所有你杀死的怪物，如果你不及时撤离，它会要了你的命。当潮汐临近时，你要么离开半径，要么躲进我的某个避难所。让我在地图上标记一个位置。等你到达那里时，我会带你熟悉环境。

text: Oh and here's another path that'll get you straight to the new sector!
new_translation: 哦，这里还有另一条路，能直接带你去新区域！

text: Meet Lauri at the shelter he marked.
new_translation: 前往劳里标记的避难所与他会合。

text: Reach the shelter marked by Lauri and meet him there.
new_translation: 前往劳里标记的避难所，并在那里与他会合。

text: You've dropped some items, go put them up
new_translation: 你掉了一些东西，去把它们收好

text: This is it. It'll keep you safe from the Tide and the enemies. It's like one anomaly inside another. These are the only normal places left in the Radius. At least a small part of our old lives is still here... Right, I'll mark the other shelters on your map so you can find them more easily...
new_translation: 就是这里了。它能保护你免受潮汐和敌人的伤害。就像一个异常区中的异常区。这些是半径仅存的正常区域。至少我们旧生活的一小部分还保留在这里……对了，我会在地图上标记其他避难所，方便你更容易找到它们……

text: Reach the isolated location though a Door Anomaly and extract an Artifact from an Invisible Nest.
new_translation: 通过门异常抵达隔离区域，并从隐形巢穴中提取异常物。
接收高级异常物探测器

text: Get the Advanced Artifact Detector from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端获取高级异常物探测器。

text: Locate the Door Anomaly that leads to the Recreation Base and enter it.
new_translation: 找到通往休憩基地的门异常并进入其中。

text: Secure the Artifact from the Invisible Nest
new_translation: 从隐形巢穴中获取异常物

text: Locate the Invisible Nest and reveal the Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector.
new_translation: 定位隐形巢穴，并使用高级异常物探测器揭示异常物。

text: Return to the Facility and submit the Artifact.
new_translation: 返回基地并提交异常物。

text: Well... Looks like we really stirred things up! Everyone's running around like crazy! I was even called in to see the boss!.. Anyway, they've put a temporary moratorium on any serious experiments for all Explorers – and some have been reassigned to test the new portals. As for us, we're sticking to the simple stuff – no more complex interventions for now.
new_translation: 嗯……看来我们真的把事情闹大了！所有人都忙得团团转，我甚至被叫去见了上司！……总之，他们临时叫停了所有探索者参与的严肃实验，还有一些人被调去测试新出现的传送门。至于我们，先做些简单的事。暂时别再搞复杂干预了。

text: But! There's an upside! With all these portals popping up, we now have access to a pretty interesting spot. It's not just super isolated – it's got these weird artifact nests. Invisible ones!
new_translation: 不过！也有好消息！随着这些传送门不断出现，我们现在能进入一个相当有意思的地点。那里不只是特别偏僻，还出现了一些奇怪的异常物巢穴。隐形的那种！

text: A regular detector won't pick them up, so here's the upgraded model. Good luck out there! Please try to avoid any more cataclysms this time, okay?
new_translation: 普通探测器无法侦测到它们，所以给你这个升级版型号。祝你在外顺利！这次请尽量避免再引发任何灾难，好吗？

text: Well, glad there were no major surprises this time! Looks like the "Doors" stabilized pretty quickly. They seem safe enough to use now. We did great! Quietly reconned a new spot, snagged a hidden artifact, and didn't blow anything up for once. So, how did you like the new detector? Opens up new possibilities, right? Things have calmed down a bit here too. Everything's back to normal. Which means the next big mission's gonna be something else. Just wait.
new_translation: 呼，这次没出什么大意外真是万幸！看来那些“门”异常很快稳定下来了。现在用起来应该足够安全。咱们干得漂亮！悄悄侦察了新地点，捞到一个隐藏异常物，而且这次总算没炸坏东西。那么，你觉得新探测器怎么样？打开了新可能性对吧？这边事态也稍微平息了。一切都恢复正常了。这意味着下次大任务绝对非同寻常。等着瞧吧。

text: Inspect the Door Anomaly with Throwsonde.
new_translation: 找到通往休闲基地的门异常并进入。

text: Get a Throwsonde from the Terminal.
Reach the Church and enter its grounds.
new_translation: 到达教堂并进入教堂范围。

text: Find a way to unlock the Church door using the clues from the church grounds.
new_translation: 利用教堂区域内的线索找到解锁教堂大门的方法。

text: Activate the Throwsonde and throw it into the Door Anomaly.
new_translation: 激活投掷探针并将其投入门异常。

text: Collect the Throwsonde and deliver it to the Facility.
new_translation: 收集投掷探针并将其送至基地。

text: The Radius never stops surprising us. We've discovered a brand new type of anomaly – this one with teleportation properties. Just imagine how much we could learn from them!
new_translation: 半径总能给我们带来惊喜。我们发现了一种全新的异常类型——这种具有传送特性。想象一下我们能从中学到多少东西！

text: These anomalies are extremely rare. You need to reach one of them as soon as possible and launch these newly developed throwsondes into it so we can get the data we need.
new_translation: 这些异常极为罕见。你得尽快赶到其中一个，把这些新研发的投掷探针扔进去，好让我们拿到需要的数据。

text: According to our intel, getting there won't be easy – so you might need to improvise and stay sharp. I think you're up for it!
new_translation: 根据情报，到那里可不容易——所以你得随机应变，保持警惕。我觉得你搞得定！

text: Poking around those "doors" is a bold move! Look, that is no ordinary church. It's locked up, so you'll have to find a way inside. The bells might be worth a closer look – they seem to be protecting it.
new_translation: 去研究那些“门”，胆子可真不小！听着，那可不是普通的教堂。它被锁住了，你得想办法进去。那些钟也许值得仔细看看，它们似乎在保护那座教堂。

text: Gotta ring the bells four times before the service starts. But what's the order? Why did I say I knew how to do it?
new_translation: 仪式开始前得敲四次钟。但顺序是什么？我干嘛要说自己会啊？

text: Look, the first star! Or is that a satellite?
new_translation: 看，第一颗星星！那会不会是卫星？

text: Grab an umbrella! They said on the radio a storm's coming at two.
new_translation: 拿把伞！收音机里说两点钟会有暴风雨。

text: Okay, so the third word's "crescent". What a tricky scanword!
new_translation: 好吧，第三个词是“新月形”。真是个棘手的填字游戏！

text: ...the Sun is the last one to go to sleep. Sweet dreams, my dear...
new_translation: ……太阳是最后一个入睡的。晚安，亲爱的……

text: Oh, I'm so glad you're okay! We detected a massive disturbance! And then – a full-blown chain reaction! Absolutely incredible!.. It triggered multiple portals across different sectors. Can you believe it?! A real Resonance Cascade! I wonder what it actually feels like – stepping through that magic “door”..! Does your every single cell shift through space? Or does it just tear you apart at the entrance and put you back together at the exit? And after that – are you still the same you or just a copy?.. My head's spinning even thinking about it! Let the scientists figure that one out. We'll keep doing what we do best – right, Explorer 73?
new_translation: 哦，真高兴你没事！我们检测到了一次巨大的扰动！然后是彻底爆发的连锁反应！简直不可思议！……它在不同区域触发了多个传送门。你能相信吗？！一次真正的共振级联！我真想知道，穿过那扇神奇的“门”到底是什么感觉……是你的每一个细胞都在空间中位移？还是说它会在入口把你撕碎，再在出口把你拼回去？那之后，你还是原来的你吗？还是只是一个复制品？……光是想想我都头晕！让科学家去研究这个吧。我们继续做我们最擅长的事，对吧，73号探索者？

text: TOP: It's All About the Distortion
new_translation: 首要任务：一切都关乎扭曲

text: Take measurements with the Distortion Sensor in the Distortion Zone and test the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype.
new_translation: 在扭曲领域内使用扭曲传感器进行测量，并测试抗扭曲头罩原型。

text: Get the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端领取抗扭曲头罩原型。

text: Retrieve the Distortion Sensor from the marked Distortion Zone.
new_translation: 从标记的扭曲领域取回扭曲传感器。

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the first marked spot.
new_translation: 将展开的扭曲传感器放置在第一个标记点。

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
new_translation: 按下传感器上的按钮开始测量，并等待过程完成。

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the next marked spot.
new_translation: 将展开的扭曲传感器放置在下一个标记位置。

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
new_translation: 按下传感器上的按钮开始测量，并等待过程完成。

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the last marked spot.
new_translation: 将展开的扭曲传感器放置在最后一个标记位置。

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
new_translation: 按下传感器上的按钮开始测量，并等待过程完成。

text: Deliver the Distortion Sensor to the Terminal at Facility 27.
new_translation: 将扭曲传感器送至27号基地的终端。

text: The Distortion Zones are relatively new to us. We don't fully understand their nature yet, but they damage both our equipment and Explorers.
new_translation: 我们对扭曲领域了解还不多。还没完全搞清楚它们的原理，但它们会损坏设备和探索者。

text: But there's good news – we've learned to shield our devices from the effect. And now we need you to take measurements and bring back one of those protected devices from the Distortion Zone – the one your colleague deployed earlier.
new_translation: 但好消息是——我们已经学会了保护设备免受其影响。现在需要你进行测量，并从扭曲领域带回一个受保护的设备——就是你同事早前部署的那个。

text: You'll also be field-testing a protective headgear. In theory, it should let you to explore Distortion Zones without dying. We understand that rebirth is not completely free for you, after all. It's still just a prototype, of course... but I really hope it helps you get out of there alive and... mostly intact. Good luck!
new_translation: 你还要实地测试一件防护头具。理论上，它应该能让你进入扭曲领域探索，而不至于死在里面。毕竟我们明白，重生对你来说也不是毫无代价。当然，它还只是原型……但我真心希望它能让你活着回来，而且……尽量完整。祝你好运！

text: I hope that little mask works better than it looks. So... back in the day, Explorers would just run into Distortion Zones without any mask... desperately trying to set up a sensor before dropping dead? Well, at least they're providing you with some gear now! We'll need all the help if we ever want to escape this place.
new_translation: 希望那个小面罩的效果比外观看起来好。所以……以前的探索者会不戴任何面罩，直接冲进扭曲领域……拼命想在倒下之前把传感器架好？好吧，至少他们现在给你配了一些装备！如果我们真想逃出这个地方，任何帮助都不能少。

text: You good? So that thing did help after all. I know you can come back. But sending you off to die, over and over again, just so their scientists get the data... all the while hiding behind excuses like “for the good of mankind”... That's not right. That's not human. I hope Eva doesn't end up like them...
new_translation: 你还好吗？看来那东西确实有用。我知道你能回来。可一次又一次把你送去送死，只为了让他们的科学家拿到数据……还躲在“为了人类福祉”这种借口后面……这不对。这根本不是人该做的事。我希望伊娃最后不要变成他们那样……

text: Excellent work! The data we got is absolutely incredible! Readings from the protected devices are completely clean! And hey – the protection worked for you too! So all that suffering wasn't for nothing! See? Little by little, we're starting to adapt to the Radius. That means we gotta keep pushing. Sooner or later, we'll create something groundbreaking! Something that could change the world! And you can keep the prototype. We already know what needs fixing. The final model will be out for all Explorers soon enough!
new_translation: 干得漂亮！我们拿到的数据简直不可思议！受保护设备的读数完全干净！而且，嘿，防护对你也生效了！所以那些痛苦没有白受！看到了吗？我们正在一点一点适应半径。这意味着我们必须继续推进。迟早，我们会造出真正突破性的东西，足以改变世界！这个原型你可以留着。需要修正的地方我们已经知道了，最终型号很快就会配发给所有探索者！
首要任务：一小步，一大步

text: Find a path to the new sector and secure an unstable Artifact.
new_translation: 找到通往新区域的道路，并确保一个不稳定异常物的安全。

text: Get the Artifact Container Prototype from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端获取异常物容器原型。

text: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 找到通往 Pechorsk 异常新区域的路径。

text: Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.
new_translation: 握住劳里的手，让他把你拉入交界之地。

text: Travel throught the in-between with Lauri using the Compass on your palm and lighting up the lamps.
new_translation: 借助手掌上的指南针，点亮沿途的提灯，与劳里一同穿越交界之地。

text: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector. Place the Artifact into the Container Prototype.
new_translation: 使用高级异常物探测器定位并揭示不稳定的异常物。将异常物放入容器原型中。

text: Deliver the Container with Artifact to Facility 27.
new_translation: 将装有异常物的容器送至27号基地。

text: Alright, it's time for us to move forward. You'll need to find your way to a sector that lies deeper in the Radius, closer to its center.
new_translation: 好了，该继续前进了。你需要找到通往半径更深处的路，更靠近中心的地方。

text: You know... going through the passage, you completely vanished from all our scanners for a while. I got so scared then!.. But now I'm sure you'll make it through again – nothing to worry about! Safe journey, Explorer 73! Can't wait to see you back!
new_translation: 你知道吗……你穿过通道时，曾经有一阵子从我们所有扫描仪上彻底消失。我当时真的吓坏了！……不过现在我确定你还能再穿过去，没什么好担心的！一路平安，73号探索者！等你回来！

text: So the Committee sent you to the next sector... I bet as soon as we're ready to go to the center, they'll suddenly have a job for us. Their own little mission. They always do... Okay, we'll deal with it when we get there. I've looked around the sectors we've been to and found a passage.
new_translation: 所以委员会把你派去了下一个区域……我敢打赌，只要我们一准备前往中心，他们就会突然给我们安排活儿。他们自己的小任务。他们总是这样……好吧，等到了那一步再说。我查看了我们去过的那些区域，找到了一条通道。

text: I hate this place! All this buzzing like an old TV... Eva will probably lose track of you again... Alright, same drill as before: you light the lamps, I tune your compass, you follow it, and I'll clear the path ahead. We'll need to get through these woods first. There's a lot of “Dandelions” ahead, so watch your step!
new_translation: 我讨厌这地方！到处都是嗡嗡声，像一台老电视……伊娃多半又会跟丢你……好吧，按老办法来：你点亮灯，我校准你的指南针，你跟着它走，我替你清出前面的路。我们得先穿过这片树林。前面有很多“蒲公英”，小心脚下！

text: Our next lamp should be right across the lake. Choose which way you want to go around it. I have a feeling the “locals” won't be too happy to see you.
new_translation: 我们的下一盏提灯应该就在湖对面。选条路绕过去吧。我有种预感，“本地居民”见到你不会太高兴。

text: Good! We're almost out of the woods. The next spot is a power line tower. It's right between the forest and the swamps. In the fog it'll stand out like a beacon, you can't miss it.
new_translation: 很好！我们快出树林了。下一个地点是高压线塔。就在森林和沼泽之间。在雾中它会像灯塔一样显眼，你不可能错过。

text: Alright, now we have to cross the swamps. Take it slow, and please try not to drown. Also I bet there are a bunch of those invisible things crawling around. Keep your distance, don't let them catch you!
new_translation: 好了，现在我们必须穿越沼泽。慢慢来，千万别淹死。而且我敢肯定有一堆隐形的东西在爬来爬去。保持距离，别让它们抓住你！

text: We're halfway through the swamps. Those invisible things aren't going anywhere, and Mimics could show up as backup too.
new_translation: 沼泽已经走了一半。那些隐形的东西不会消失，拟态体也可能作为援军出现。

text: Damn, that was like an action movie! Remind me not to get on your bad side. Anyway, you can relax a little. Just make it across this pass and we're out of the in-between. It's blocked with rocks, so you'll have to squeeze through. Keep an eye out for anomalies. I'll be waiting at the exit!
new_translation: 见鬼，刚才简直像动作电影！提醒我以后千万别惹你。总之，你可以稍微放松一下了。只要穿过这条隘口，我们就能离开交界之地。那里被岩石堵住了，你得挤过去。留意异常。我会在出口等你！

text: Finally! The exit's right over there. Light that lamp and let's get the hell outta here. I'm sick of this place...
new_translation: 终于！出口就在那边。点亮那盏灯，我们赶紧离开这鬼地方。我受够这里了...

text: Phew, catching up with you can be a real pain... I've got good news and bad news. Good news – I found another passage from here. It's ready, use it anytime. Bad news – it won't take you back to the Facility. It'll only drop you somewhere else in the same sector. Better than nothing I guess. We gotta head back. Your call how to get there.
new_translation: 呼，追上你可真够费劲的……我有好消息和坏消息。好消息——我找到了从这里出发的另一条通道。已经准备好了，随时可以使用。坏消息——它不会带你返回基地。只会把你送到同一区域的另一个地方。总比没有强吧。我们得回去了。怎么走由你决定。

text: Hey! You okay? I knew you'd make it. So, what did you think of the new sector? Our data says it's larger and more dangerous. The stakes are getting higher the closer we get to the center. Oh, and congrats on the promotion! We greatly appreciate your contribution and this bonus is our way of showing it. I can also tell you now that we've developed a medication for your dependency on the Radius. You'll be able to live a normal life outside the Facility! But to receive it, you need Security Level 7. It's only granted for an outstanding contribution. We have every reason to work even harder!
new_translation: 嘿！你还好吗？我就知道你能成功。那么，你觉得新区城怎么样？我们的数据显示它更大、更危险。越接近中心，风险就越高。哦，恭喜晋升！我们非常感激你的贡献，这笔奖金是我们的一点心意。现在我可以告诉你了，我们已经研发出治疗你对半径依赖的药物。你将能在基地外过上正常生活！但要获得它，你需要达到安全等级7。只有做出杰出贡献才能授予。我们完全有理由更加努力！

text: Secure and use the Door Artifact. The Sensors marked on the map will help you obtain it.
new_translation: 确保安全并使用门之异常物。地图上标记的传感器将帮助你获取它。
接收门之异常物激活器

text: Get the Door Artifact Activator from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端获取门之异常物激活器。

text: Place the Artifact into the Activator
new_translation: 将异常物放入激活器中

text: Place the Sensors in the Unstable Nest area to limit its movements.
new_translation: 将传感器放置在不稳定巢穴区域以限制其活动。

text: Use the Door Artifact Activator on the marked spot to activate Door Artifact and trigger the Door Anomaly.
new_translation: 在标记位置使用门之异常物激活器以激活门之异常物并触发门异常。

text: Go through the Door Anomaly to check where it leads.
new_translation: 穿过门异常以查看它通向何处。
交付门之异常物激活器

text: Deliver the Door Artifact Activator to the Terminal at the Facility.
new_translation: 将门之异常物激活器交付至基地的终端。

text: We may not be able to control the anomalous "Doors" directly. But if certain artifacts can interact with them... Think of the possibilities this could open up for us – and for other Explorers!
new_translation: 我们或许无法直接控制异常的“门”。但如果某些异常物能与它们互动……想想这可能为我们——以及其他探索者——开启怎样的可能性！

text: We prepared a device that will activate the special artifact. You'll need to field-test it in the Radius. Keep in mind, activation must occur at a specific location. Otherwise, the data will be compromised.
new_translation: 我们准备了一台设备来激活特殊异常物。你需要在半径内进行实地测试。请记住，激活必须在特定地点进行。否则，数据将会受损。

text: You didn't believe all their promises about the medicine, did you? I bet Eva had no idea whether that medicine even existed. They just had to tell her and she ran off to dangle that carrot in front you. Why would they offer you freedom anyway? You are a perfect fit for their dirty work. You can't go anywhere and your lifespan is almost infinite. They gotta be out of their minds to let you go.
new_translation: 你不会真相信他们关于那种药的所有承诺吧？我敢打赌，伊娃甚至不知道那药到底存不存在。他们只要跟她说一声，她就会跑来把这根胡萝卜吊在你面前。可他们凭什么要给你自由？你太适合替他们干脏活了。你哪里都去不了，寿命还几乎无限。要是他们真肯放你走，那才是疯了。

text: See? I knew it would work. It's like our own Evacuation Device, except this time you don't get torn to shreds! Oh... sorry about that. Still, even when you die, you just come back like nothing happened, don't you? I mean, who wouldn't want that kind of power? In any case, the device performed very well. It's a pity this artifact is so rare, but we're still going to study its potential. I'm sure we'll find a way to put it to good use. Oh, and by the way... we're very close to a breakthrough in understanding how the Radius alters things, and both of us might play a big part in that.
new_translation: 看吧？我就知道它会起作用。这就像我们自己的撤离装置，只不过这次你不会被撕成碎片体！哦……抱歉提那个。不过，就算你死了，也能像什么都没发生过一样回来，对吧？我是说，谁不想要那种力量呢？无论如何，这台设备表现非常出色。可惜这种异常物如此稀有，但我们仍会研究它的潜力。我相信我们会找到好好利用它的方法。哦，顺便说一句……我们在理解半径如何改变事物方面即将取得突破，而我们俩都可能在其中扮演重要角色。

text: Look at you! Didn't even need my help to make that clean jump back to the outside world. Right after your jump, I felt something new appear in that sector, a strange passage. Nothing like the ones I normally use to move you around. Let's check it out. I can't tell where it leads yet, but it could be useful.
new_translation: 看看你！根本不需要我帮忙，就干净利落地跳回了外面的世界。你跳走之后，我感觉那个区域里出现了新的东西，一条奇怪的通道。它和我平时用来挪动你的那些通道完全不一样。我们去看看吧。我现在还不知道它通向哪里，但也许会有用。

text: Check where the strange passage that suddenly appeared leads to.
new_translation: 调查突然出现的奇怪通道通向何处。

text: Reach the entrance to the strange passage.
Find out where the strange passage leads.
new_translation: 查明奇怪通道通向何处。

text: Would you look at that!.. I've never seen anything like it in this sector before. It's like this place was hidden... or maybe it didn't even exist until you jumped here. Did you notice? This passage doesn't have my usual "entrance". The Radius never stops surprising me... Well, you've got yourself another shortcut. Use it anytime!
new_translation: 瞧瞧这个！……我以前从没在这个区域见过这样的东西。就好像这地方一直被藏了起来……或者在你跳到这里之前，它根本不存在。你注意到了吗？这条通道没有我平常那种“入口”。半径总能让我吃惊……好吧，你又有了一条捷径。随时都能用！

text: Carry out an experiment on the provided living organism. The Portable Alteration Unit should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.
new_translation: 用提供的活体生物完成实验。便携式改造单元应背在背上替代背包使用。

text: Get the Alteration Unit, Supercapacitor, and Artifact Container from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端获取改造单元、超级电容器和异常物容器。

text: Charge the Supercapacitor from any Electrostatic Anomaly to power the Alteration Unit.
new_translation: 从任何静电异常处为超级电容器充电，以启动改造单元。

text: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact, and place it into the Artifact Container.
new_translation: 定位并揭示不稳定的异常物，并将其放入异常物容器中。

text: Assemble and place the Alteration Unit
Insert the charged Supercapacitor and Artifact Container with Artifact into the Alteration Unit and place it on the marked spot.
new_translation: 将充好电的超级电容器和装有异常物的异常物容器插入改造单元，并将其放置在标记地点。

text: Press the button to start the alteration process.
new_translation: 按下按钮启动改造过程。

text: Wait for the process to complete.
Check the result of the alteration experiment.
Complete the mission at the Facility.

Explorer 73, we've been given a mission that could be incredibly important for the Committee, and for humanity itself. Are you ready? We need to make sure we've really found a way to deliberately alter living organisms using artifacts.
new_translation: 探索者73号，我们接到了一项可能对委员会乃至全人类都至关重要的任务。你准备好了吗？我们必须确认已找到通过异常物定向改造生物体的方法。

text: It won't be easy. You may even have to die a few times along the way, though it shouldn't be a big deal for you at this point, right? I'm sure you can make it. Good luck and take care of your new little friend!
new_translation: 这绝非易事。途中你甚至可能需要经历数次死亡——不过对你现在而言应该不算大事，对吧？相信你能做到。祝你好运，记得照顾好你的新小同伴！

text: So, the Committee decided to reach for something meant for God alone... and the Radius. They've got some nerve. And ambition. You know what I can't stand about all this? They want someone else to do the dirty work out there. They sit safe and sound, taking all the credit... and what's left for you? They talk about "happiness for everyone," but someone always has to pay the price for science. This time it's that poor animal. Next time who will it be? You? Is all this really worth it?
new_translation: 所以委员会竟敢觊觎本应属于造物主的力量…还有半径。他们可真够胆大妄为的。知道我最厌恶什么吗？总让别人在前线干脏活。他们安坐后方坐享其成…而你得到什么？嘴上说着‘为全人类谋福祉’，可科学进步总要有人付出代价。这次是那只可怜的动物，下次会轮到谁？你吗？这一切真的值得？

text: Hey, are you okay? I know that was hard, but look at the payoff. It's not exactly what we were hoping for, but we still managed to alter a living organism. Not a human being yet, but we're so close now! Ah, the report's in. Let's see... We did it! The experiment was a success. It seems this particular alteration was caused by an additional influence of the Radius. Our scientists will try to reproduce it in labs outside. And that's not all, you and I have been chosen for the next crucial step. We did great!
new_translation: 嘿，你还好吗？我明白这很艰难，但看看成果。虽未完全达到预期，我们终究实现了生物体改造。虽非人类，但只差一步了！啊，报告出来了。我们成功了！实验表明这次特殊变异由半径的附加影响导致。外部实验室将尝试复现该现象。更重要的是，你我已被选中执行下一关键阶段。我们配合得太棒了！

text: Deliver the special Artifact to the Facility.
new_translation: 将特殊异常物运送至研究基地。

text: Get the Door Artifact Activator and wristband from the Terminal.
new_translation: 从终端机获取门异常物激活器与腕带。

text: Put on the wristband to pair it with the Activator.
new_translation: 佩戴腕带以配对激活器。

text: Locate and place the Door Artifact into the Activator.
new_translation: 定位门异常物并将其置入激活器。

text: Find the path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
new_translation: 寻找通往 Pechorsk 异常新区域的路径。

text: Find the way to the center
Check if you can get to the center from the marked spot.
new_translation: 在标记点确认能否抵达中心区域。
定位并收集3个电梯按钮。

text: Put the elevator buttons back into the control panels and open the door.
new_translation: 将电梯按钮装回控制面板并开启电梯门。

text: Dive into the Sphere to reach the center of the Radius.
new_translation: 潜入球体以抵达半径的中心。

text: Okay... this is it. What we're about to do could change humanity's fate, and I'm not exaggerating. The stakes have never been higher for the Committee. Our new device can grant your abilities to an ordinary person without binding them to the Radius. If this works, we could free humanity from disease, aging... even death.
new_translation: 好吧……就是这里了。我们即将做的事可能会改变人类的命运，我并非夸大其词。对委员会而言，风险从未如此之高。我们的新装置能够赋予普通人能力，而无需将他们束缚在半径内。如果这能成功，我们就能让人类摆脱疾病、衰老……乃至死亡。

text: But to make that happen, we need a powerful artifact capable of profound alterations – the Golden Sphere, hidden at the very heart of the Radius. You have to reach it and bring it to us. If you complete this mission, you'll be granted immediate Security Level 7 clearance and the medicine. You'll be able to leave the Facility for good and live a normal life. And you'll be the first to ever earn that right.
new_translation: 但为了实现这一点，我们需要一件能够进行深刻改造的强大异常物——黄金球体，它隐藏在半径的最深处。你必须到达那里，并将其带回给我们。如果你完成这项任务，你将立即获得安全等级7的权限和药物。你将能够永久离开基地，过上正常的生活。而且，你将是第一个赢得这项权利的人。

text: Honestly, we don't know what lies that deep within the Pechorsk Anomaly. Explorer 61 was the only one ever confirmed to have made it that far, and... vanished without a trace. So... I know you can do this and make it back. But... I'm scared for you... Please, be careful... and come back, Explorer 73...
new_translation: 说实话，我们不知道 Pechorsk 异常区深处究竟有什么。探索者61号是唯一被确认到达那么远的人，然后……就消失得无影无踪了。所以……我知道你能做到并安全返回。但是……我为你感到害怕……请务必小心……并平安归来，探索者73号……

text: Ha! So the Committee wants our ticket out? The Golden Sphere? They're not getting it. That thing's ours. I found the way to the center. First, we pass through the in-between again. Then we fight our way through a new, smaller sector. Through there we'll enter the heart of the Radius. Do you think we should get that artifact just to be safe? Alright, I'll be waiting by the passages!
new_translation: 哈！所以委员会想要我们的出路？黄金球体？他们休想得到。那东西是我们的。我找到了通往中心的路。首先，我们要再次穿过交界之地。然后一路打进一个新的、更小的区域。穿过那里，就能进入半径的核心区域。你觉得我们是不是该先拿到那件异常物，保险一点？好吧，我会在通道旁等你！

text: Let's clear a path to the sector near the center. Guess this place doesn't care about physics. The ground is all broken up. You'll have to jump and climb to get across. Keep your eyes peeled. We're not alone here. Also please don't fall. I promise there's nothing down there...
new_translation: 让我们清理出一条通往中心附近区域的道路。我猜这地方根本不在乎物理定律。地面全都破碎了。你得跳跃和攀爬才能过去。保持警惕。这里并非只有我们。还有，请不要掉下去。我保证下面什么都没有……

text: You good? Feeling dizzy yet? Catch your breath. One wrong step, and you're flying into the abyss. Get to that larger piece of ground. After a few more like that, climb up and you'll see the lamp.
new_translation: 还好吗？已经开始头晕了？先喘口气。这里一步踩错，就会直接飞进深渊。先去那块大一点的地面。再越过几处这样的落脚点，爬上去之后就能看到那盏灯。

text: Look at that! What a crazy view....fascinating, isn't it? Follow these rail tracks over the abyss, then cross the bridge. I'll meet you on the other side. Let's just hope no trains come through here...
new_translation: 看那边！这景象也太疯狂了……很迷人，对吧？沿着这些悬在深渊上的铁轨走，再穿过那座桥。我会在另一头等你。希望这里不会突然开来一列火车……

text: The next large piece is covered by anomalies. Take it slow and put those probes to good use.
new_translation: 下一大片落脚点被异常现象覆盖着。慢慢来，把探测器用好。

text: That's it! We made it. The next sector is no better than this one... Keep going and you'll reach it. You'll find a familiar place there, at least I hope it's still familiar to you... I'll meet you in the shelter near the passage.
new_translation: 就是这样！我们到了。下一个区域也不会比这里轻松……继续往前，你就能抵达那里。那边有个熟悉的地方，至少我希望你还认得它……我会在通道附近的避难所等你。

text: Ever missed the school? Feels like taking exams all over again. You can take this elevator up, just find a way to open it. Look for whatever operates it... buttons, maybe, or something like that. You get the idea.
new_translation: 你有想念过学校吗？感觉像又要考试了一样。你可以坐这部电梯上去，只要先想办法把它打开。找找能操纵它的东西……按钮之类的。你懂我的意思。

text: After the upper floors you'll find what looks like a shelter. Jump inside it. It'll take you... us to the Presence. It's waiting, I can feel it. You know... It was great to see you again. Can't say I was happy with the part I had to play... But I'm glad I could make it this far, side by side with a friend. Let's finish this.
new_translation: 穿过上层后，你会看到一个像避难所的地方。跳进去。它会把你……把我们带到那个存在面前。它在等着，我能感觉到。你知道吗……能再见到你真好。我不能说自己喜欢被迫扮演的这个角色……但能和朋友并肩走到这里，我很高兴。让我们结束这一切吧。
亲眼见证这一切……确实耐人寻味。

text: It's time to make your final choice.
We have it! Don't miss your chance! It's now or never...
new_translation: 我们拿到了！别错过机会！成败就在此一举……

text: Damn it! Of course the Committee had to interfere! Goddamn Eva and her scientists...
new_translation: 该死！委员会果然还是要插手！该死的伊娃，还有她那群科学家……

text: This was predictable. We will introduce an external factor into the choice.
new_translation: 这并不意外。我们会向这次选择引入一个外部变量。

text: Oh, I'm so done with these UNPSC dogs and their toys!..
new_translation: 我真是受够这些 UNPSC 的走狗，还有他们那些破玩具了！

text: Behold what you call the Golden Sphere.
new_translation: 看看吧，这就是你们口中的黄金球体。

text: It is a symbol. It is energy. It is will.
new_translation: 它是象征。它是能量。它是意志。

text: Whom will you choose? Who shall be left with nothing or be destroyed?
new_translation: 你会选择谁？谁又会被剥夺一切，或被彻底毁灭？

text: Will you grant a full life to your Guide?
new_translation: 你会赐予你的向导完整的人生吗？

text: /this shadow is in so much pain.../
Or will you assist the Committee in altering humanity?
new_translation: 还是说，你会协助委员会改造人类？

text: Or will you sever yourself from the Radius?
new_translation: 又或者，你会斩断自己与半径的联系？

text: Don't mind me! After all, I'm just a shadow of someone you called a friend. Save yourself!
new_translation: 别管我！反正我也只是你曾称为朋友的那个人留下的一道影子。救你自己！

text: Just ignore the Committee's orders. Don't sacrifice your life and freedom for their ambitions!
new_translation: 别听委员会的命令。不要为了他们的野心牺牲自己的生命和自由！

text: Decide who will receive the Golden Sphere. All else shall be purged...
new_translation: 决定谁将得到黄金球体。其余一切，都将被清除……

text: It is time! Show me what you value most...
new_translation: 时刻到了！让我看看，你最珍视的究竟是什么……

text: No!!! Choose yourself! You're gonna die for good!
new_translation: 不！！！选你自己！你会真正死掉的！

text: Don't let them have the Sphere! You'll get us both killed!
new_translation: 别让他们拿到球体！你会害死我们两个的！

text: Yes! Do it! Live your new life!
new_translation: 对！就这么做！去过你的新人生！

text: Goodbye, my friend!.. Don't forget me...
new_translation: 再见了，我的朋友！……别忘了我……

text: But what about you?.. How will I live without...
new_translation: 那你呢？……没有你，我要怎么活下去……

text: That damn Eva has brainwashed you!.. NOOOO!!!...
new_translation: 该死的伊娃把你洗脑了！……不！！！……

text: What did you do?! You'll no longer be human!!! NOOOO!!!...
new_translation: 你做了什么？！你再也不会是人类了！！！不！！！……
现在，面对它带来的后果。

text: We will reveal the future you've chosen...
new_translation: 我们将揭示你所选择的未来……

text: lives an ordinary life in the outside world.
new_translation: 在外面的世界过着普通人的生活。

text: He is a good person. He is trying to be a good husband, father, and neighbor.
new_translation: 他是个好人。他努力做一个好丈夫、好父亲、好邻居。

text: he has no one he could truly call a friend.
new_translation: 他没有任何一个真正称得上朋友的人。

text: And he often blames himself for the way things ended.
new_translation: 他也常常为事情最终变成那样而责怪自己。

text: He often thinks of the Radius and what you've been through together.
new_translation: 他时常想起半径，想起你们共同经历过的一切。

text: Sometimes he wishes he could forget.
new_translation: 有时，他希望自己能把这一切忘掉。

text: But he knows that he once was and will always be a part of the Radius.
new_translation: 但他知道，自己曾经是，也将永远是半径的一部分。

text: She reached her goal, she delivered results.
new_translation: 她达成了目标，也交出了成果。

text: Another one of the Committee's attempts has succeeded. An ordinary person has been Altered.
new_translation: 委员会的又一次尝试成功了。一个普通人被改变了。
但 73 号探索者失踪了……

text: ...and nobody seems to care, except for her...
For her, it's too high a price to pay for whatever this is all building toward.
new_translation: 对她来说，无论这一切最终通向什么，这个代价都太高了。

text: One more thing she knows is that the Committee's leaders are negotiating with those who wield money and power in the outside world.
new_translation: 她还知道一件事：委员会高层正在与外界那些掌握金钱和权力的人谈判。

text: And she doesn't like where this is heading at all.
new_translation: 她一点也不喜欢这一切的走向。

text: You live your normal life as an ordinary person in the outside world, like millions of others.
new_translation: 你像千百万人一样，在外面的世界过着普通人的生活。

text: You cope well. But you're alone among all those people and that never seems to change.
new_translation: 你适应得不错。可在人群之中，你依然孤身一人，而且这似乎永远不会改变。

text: You don't owe anything to anyone in this world. But all your sense of meaning, all your purpose – it was left behind, inside the Radius.
new_translation: 你不欠这个世界任何人任何东西。但你所有的意义感，所有的目标，都留在了半径之中。

text: You even tried to find Eva once. But you couldn't.
new_translation: 你甚至试着找过伊娃。但你没能找到她。

text: But the Committee found you. And your life is full of color again.
new_translation: 但委员会找到了你。于是，你的生活再次有了色彩。

text: You already know there's only one place on Earth where you can hide forever.
new_translation: 你早已知道，地球上只有一个地方可以让你永远藏身。

text: Rejecting all that is human is itself very human.
new_translation: 否定一切人性，这本身就是一种人性。

text: In return, we gave you knowledge.
new_translation: 作为回报，我们赐予了你知识。

text: You have an eternity to search for answers in the Radius. You have fully adapted to it and have even become a part of it.
new_translation: 你拥有永恒的时间，在半径中寻找答案。你已经完全适应了它，甚至成为了它的一部分。

text: Seeing this place brings it all back. We managed to get the vouchers through the union and came here. Felt like the whole place was ours! You with your new tape recorder and me with my old guitar. Everybody loved hanging around us, playing volleyball, swimming in the pool, singing and dancing... I miss those days.
new_translation: 看到这个地方，一切都回来了。我们设法通过工会弄到了优惠券，来到了这里。感觉整个地方都是我们的！你带着你的新录音机，我带着我的旧吉他。大家都喜欢围着我们，打排球，在泳池里游泳，唱歌跳舞……我怀念那些日子。

text: All this fog... it's everywhere. Along the outer edge, around the stable zones, throughout the in-between. It's thick. Unsettling. It makes everything look blurred and uncertain. Like a smoke screen. Perfect for hiding things, or making you doubt what you're seeing...
new_translation: 这些雾……到处都是。沿着外缘，包围稳定区域，也遍布交界之地。它很浓，很不安分，让一切都显得模糊又不确定，像一道烟幕。它太适合藏东西了，也太容易让你怀疑自己看见的东西……

text: So... is any of this actually real, or not? The outside world, the Committee, Eva... they're real. You're real too. And I guess I am, in some way. You can see me, hear me... so I must be here for a reason. But everything in the Radius... It feels real, but none of it makes sense, as if the Radius is playing mind games with us.
new_translation: 所以……这一切到底是真的，还是不是？外面的世界，委员会，伊娃……他们是真的。你也是真的。我想，从某种意义上说，我也是真的。你能看见我，听见我……那我一定是因为某种原因才在这里。但半径里的一切……感觉真实，却又全都说不通，就像半径在和我们玩心理游戏。

text: Just look at all these gloomy figures! Standing around frozen like statues. Creeps me out seeing so many of them together. Could be people we knew back in our old lives... Everyone from Pechorsk – all with such different fates now. You, me, them... everyone...
new_translation: 瞧瞧这些阴森的身影！像雕像一样僵立在那儿。看到这么多聚在一起，真让人毛骨悚然。可能是我们旧日生活中认识的人……Pechorsk 的所有人——如今命运各异。你，我，他们……每个人……

text: Remember this station? I used to come here with my grandad when I was a kid. He worked on the railroad. You and I used to hang around this place a lot. Running between trains, going down to the river, hiding in the woods... Can't say much has changed, huh?
new_translation: 还记得这个车站吗？我小时候常和爷爷一起来这儿。他在铁路上工作。你和我过去也常在这一带晃荡。在列车之间奔跑，去河边，躲在树林里……看来变化不大，是吧？

text: Do you ever miss Pechorsk? Our old life? It's all gone now. The only place where it still exists is here, in the Radius. Like a distorted, distant echo... I wonder if that... Presence... could bring everything back? 1987? Maybe have the Radius appear elsewhere instead? Or just not appear at all...
new_translation: 你有想念过 Pechorsk 吗？我们过去的生活？如今一切都已消逝。唯一它还存在的地方，就是这里，在半径内。像一个扭曲而遥远的回声……我在想那个……存在体……能否让一切恢复？1987年？或者让半径出现在别处？还是干脆别出现……

text: Get comfortable and press Calibrate Height to set your height.
new_translation: 调整好姿势，然后按下 校准高度 来设置您的身高。

text: You can change or fine-tune settings in the Menu at any time by pressing {BTN_Menu}.
new_translation: 您可以随时 通过按 {BTN_Menu} 在菜单中更改或微调设置。

text:
The hints will follow your hand.
Try moving it to make it easier to read them.
new_translation:
提示会跟随你的手移动。
试着动一动，更容易看清。

text: {BTN_Sprint} to toggle Sprint. Sprinting consumes Stamina – the blue bar on your watch.
new_translation: {BTN_Sprint} 切换 冲刺。 冲刺消耗 体力—— 手表上的蓝色能量条。

text: To climb, hold {BTN_Grip} and pull yourself up.
new_translation: 攀爬时，抓住{BTN_Grip}向上拉起身体。

text: This is a modified PM with attachment rails. Take it.
new_translation: 这是一把改装版 PM， 配有配件导轨。 拿着吧。

text: Bring the Gun Light under the rail and release it.
new_translation: 将枪灯带到导轨下方 然后松开它。

text: To turn on/off the Gun Light, reach it with your hand, hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Trigger.
new_translation: 要打开/关闭枪灯， 用手接近它， 按住{BTN_Bottom}并按下扳机。

text: To remove the attachment from the gun, bring your hand to the attachment, hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Grip.
new_translation: 要从枪上移除配件， 将手靠近配件， 按住 {BTN_Bottom} 并按下抓握。

text:
Bring the Gun Light under the rail once again
and release it.
new_translation:
再次将枪灯带到导轨下方
然后松开。

text: To turn on/off the Gun Light, reach it with your hand, hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Trigger.
new_translation: 要打开/关闭枪灯， 用手接近它， 按住{BTN_Bottom}并按下扳机。

text: Now you can buy and use Vests and add Armor Plates to them. They will reduce incoming damage and increase your survivability.
new_translation: 现在您可以购买并使用背心，并为其添加护甲。它们可以减少受到的伤害并提高您的生存能力。

text: Each Vest has a dedicated inner slot for an Armor Plate.
new_translation: 每件背心都有一个专用的内槽用于放置护甲。

text: The Armor Plate gradually deteriorates as you take damage. Remember to check its condition in your current loadout window.
new_translation: 护甲会随着受到伤害而逐渐损坏。记得在当前装备窗口中检查其状态。

text: All Explorers must gather at the entry point.
new_translation: 所有探索者必须在入口点集合。

text: I don't know anything about this path yet.
new_translation: 我对这条路径还一无所知。

text: Wait for the host to start the transition.
All Explorers must be next to the bed!
new_translation: 所有探索者必须靠近床铺！

text: Ask about beta saves on next launch?
new_translation: 下次启动时询问 Beta 存档？

text: We found your beta saves. Do you want to transfer them to the full game?
new_translation: 我们找到了您的测试版存档。您想将它们转移到完整版游戏中吗？

text: We found your beta saves. Do you want to transfer them to the full game?
new_translation: 我们找到了您的测试版存档。您想将它们转移到完整版游戏中吗？

text: Please complete the Tutorial and the First Mission in Single Player Mode first!
new_translation: 请先完成单人模式的教程和第一个任务！

text: All Explorers must be nearby to proceed.
new_translation: 所有探索者必须在附近才能继续前进。

text:
Attention! Co-op Mode is currently under development. In this mode, the game may be unstable and contain bugs that significantly affect the experience.
Do you still want to start Co-op Mode
in Early Access?
new_translation: 注意！合作模式目前正在开发中。在此模式下，游戏可能不稳定，并包含严重影响体验的错误。你仍想在抢先体验版中开启合作模式吗？

text: Please ensure both host and client have the same game version installed.
new_translation: 请确保主机和客户端都安装了相同的游戏版本。

text: Are you sure you want to unlist the Co-op game you previously played as a guest?
new_translation: 确定要移除您之前作为客人加入的合作游戏吗？

text: Server list will load after your friends invite you to join a server.
new_translation: 当您的好友邀请您加入服务器后，服务器列表将会加载。

text:
Are you sure
you want to leave?
Are you sure you want to exit to Main Menu?
new_translation: 您确定要退出到主菜单吗？

text: Enemies notice flashlight and laser sight beams, and the noise you make.
new_translation: 敌人会注意到手电筒和激光瞄准器的光束，以及你发出的声响。

text:
You can remove a magazine
on AK-series by knocking it with another magazine.
new_translation:
你可以用另一个弹匣敲击
来卸下 AK 系列的弹匣。

text: Use the vise to assemble or clean your gun.
new_translation: 使用台钳来组装或清理你的枪支。

text: Use {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger} to toggle gun attachments or head flashlight.
new_translation: 使用{BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Trigger}来切换枪支配件或头灯。

text: Guns and armor wear out from use, anomalies, explosions, and hits.
new_translation: 枪支和护甲会因使用、异常、爆炸和击打而磨损。

text: You can grab another cartridge with the same hand using {BTN_Trigger}. Works for 12 G, .338, 7.62x54mm, 7.62x51mm, and 7.62х39mm ammo.
new_translation: 你可以用同一只手按 {BTN_Trigger} 抓取另一发子弹。 适用 12G、.338、7.62x54mm、7.62x51mm 和 7.62х39mm 弹药。

text: You can grab another magazine with the same hand using {BTN_Trigger}.
new_translation: 你可以使用{BTN_Trigger}用同一只手抓取另一个弹匣。

text: Pull the charging handle and press {BTN_Top} with the hand holding the gun to set it on bolt hold-open.
new_translation: 拉动拉机柄，用持枪手按下{BTN_Top} 以锁定枪机。

text: Rack the slide all the way back and press {BTN_Top} with the hand holding the gun to set it on slide-stop.
new_translation: 将套筒完全向后拉，用持枪的手按下{BTN_Top}将其设置为空仓挂机状态。

text: Hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item to view its details, state, and instruction.
new_translation: 在持握物品的手上按住{BTN_ItemInfo}可查看其详细信息、状态和说明。

text: Hold {BTN_Top} with your empty hand to check your loadout, gear, its condition and how it affects you.
new_translation: 用空手长按{BTN_Top}以检查你的装备、物品、 其状态及对你的影响。

text: Backpacks have inner lighting. Bring your hand close to it and press {BTN_Trigger} to toggle the light.

text: This is an Early Access version of the game. You may encounter bugs, and some visuals, sounds, or features are still being developed. text: Important notes about the current version: • Doesn't support LIV and OpenXRToolkit, WMR devices and HTC Vive Wands • Use 90hz refresh rate or below, NOT 120hz. • Set Meta Horizon Link as the active OpenXR runtime, if you're using Meta Horizon Link. • Use VDXR runtime, if you're using Virtual Desktop. • May not support previous saves You can find workarounds for some of the known issues in the pinned topic on Steam Discussions. Update 1.1.1 keynotes: • Shooting Range with Kill House • Magazine loading devices • New guns: G3 rifle & MP5 SMG • Up to 4 players Co-op • Walkie-talkie • Under-the-hood refactoring, optimizations, and bug fixes
